d.get(\"delinquent_accounts\") or d.get(\"delinquencies\", 0),\n            \"inquiries_last_12_months\": d.get(\"hard_inquiries\") or d.get(\"inquiries_12mo\", 0),\n            \"public_records\":       d.get(\"public_records\", []),\n        }\n\n    def _map_bank_analytics(self, result: Any) -> dict:\n        \"\"\"Map PlaidAnalyticsService result to context dict format.\"\"\"\n        if hasattr(result, \"model_dump\"):\n            d = result.model_dump()\n        elif isinstance(result, dict):\n            d = result\n        else:\n            return {}\n\n        return {\n            \"accounts\":       d.get(\"accounts\", []),\n            \"last_refresh\":   d.get(\"last_synced\") or d.get(\"last_refresh\"),\n            \"cash_flow_score\": d.get(\"cash_flow_score\"),\n            \"cash_flow_analysis\": {\n                \"average_monthly_income\": (\n                    d.get(\"avg_monthly_inflow\")\n                    or (d.get(\"cash_flow_metrics\") or {}).get(\"avg_monthly_inflow\")\n                    or d.get(\"average_monthly_income\", 0)\n                ),\n                \"average_monthly_expenses\": (\n                    d.get(\"avg_monthly_outflow\")\n                    or (d.get(\"cash_flow_metrics\") or {}).get(\"avg_monthly_outflow\")\n                    or d.get(\"average_monthly_expenses\", 0)\n                ),\n                \"seasonality_index\":        d.get(\"seasonality_index\"),\n                \"income_volatility\": (\n                    d.get(\"income_volatility\")\n                    or (d.get(\"cash_flow_metrics\") or {}).get(\"inflow_volatility_pct\")\n                ),\n            },\n            \"monthly_snapshots\": d.get(\"monthly_snapshots\", []),\n            \"monthly_cash_flows\": d.get(\"monthly_cash_flows\", []),\n            \"expense_categories\": d.get(\"expense_categories\", []),\n            \"income_categories\": d.get(\"income_categories\", []),\n            \"total_transactions\": d.get(\"total_transactions\", 0),\n            \"date_range_start\": d.get(\"date_range_start\"),\n            \"date_range_end\": d.get(\"date_range_end\"),\n            \"risk_flags\":        d.get(\"risk_flags\", []),\n        }\n\n    def _map_qb_company(self, result: Any) -> dict:\n        \"\"\"Map QuickBooksAnalyticsService result to company dict.\"\"\"\n        if hasattr(result, \"model_dump\"):\n            d = result.model_dump()\n        elif isinstance(result, dict):\n            d = result\n        else:\n            return {}\n\n        company = d.get(\"company_profile\") or d.get(\"company\") or {}\n        if hasattr(company, \"model_dump\"):\n            company = company.model_dump()\n        return {\n            \"company_name\":    company.get(\"company_name\") or d.get(\"company_name\"),\n            \"industry\":        company.get(\"industry\"),\n            \"naics_code\":      company.get(\"naics_code\"),\n            \"year_established\": company.get(\"start_date\") or company.get(\"fiscal_year_start_month\"),\n            \"employees\":       company.get(\"employee_count\"),\n            \"city\":            company.get(\"city\"),\n            \"state\":           company.get(\"state\"),\n        }\n\n    def _map_qb_financials(self, result: Any) -> dict:\n        \"\"\"Map QuickBooksAnalyticsService result to financials dict.\n\n        QBAnalyticsResult uses income_statement.total_income (not total_revenue),\n        balance_sheet.cash_and_bank, and top-level revenue, net_income, dscr, etc.\n        \"\"\"\n        if hasattr(result, \"model_dump\"):\n            d = result.model_dump()\n        elif isinstance(result, dict):\n            d = result\n        else:\n            return {}\n\n        income = d.get(\"income_statement\") or {}\n        balance = d.get(\"balance_sheet\") or {}\n        ratios = d.get(\"key_metrics\") or {}\n\n        revenue = (\n            income.get(\"total_income\")\n            or income.get(\"total_revenue\")\n            or income.get(\"revenue\")\n            or d.get(\"revenue\", 0)\n        )\n        net_income = income.get(\"net_income\") or d.get(\"net_income\", 0)\n        profit_margin = (\n            income.get(\"profit_margin_pct\")\n            or income.get(\"profit_margin\")\n            or d.get(\"profit_margin\", 0)\n        )\n        current_ratio = (\n            balance.get(\"current_ratio\")\n            or ratios.get(\"current_ratio\")\n            or d.get(\"current_ratio\", 0)\n        )\n        debt_to_equity = (\n            balance.get(\"debt_to_equity\")\n            or ratios.get(\"debt_to_equity\")\n            or d.get(\"debt_to_equity\", 0)\n        )\n        cash_on_hand = (\n            balance.get(\"cash_and_bank\")\n            or balance.get(\"cash\")\n            or balance.get(\"cash_on_hand\")\n            or d.get(\"cash_on_hand\", 0)\n        )\n        dscr = d.get(\"dscr\") or ratios.get(\"dscr\")\n        runway_months = d.get(\"runway_months\") or ratios.get(\"runway_months\")\n\n        return {\n            \"period\": income.get(\"period\"),\n            \"revenue\": revenue,\n            \"net_income\": net_income,\n            \"profit_margin\": profit_margin,\n            \"revenue_growth_yoy\": income.get(\"revenue_growth_yoy\") or d.get(\"revenue_growth_yoy\", 0),\n            \"current_ratio\": current_ratio,\n            \"debt_to_equity\": debt_to_equity,\n            \"cash_on_hand\": cash_on_hand,\n            \"monthly_burn_rate\": income.get(\"monthly_burn_rate\") or d.get(\"monthly_burn_rate\", 0),\n            \"accounts_receivable\": balance.get(\"accounts_receivable\") or d.get(\"accounts_receivable\", 0),\n            \"dscr\": dscr,\n            \"runway_months\": runway_months,\n        }\n\n    def _describe_available_analysis(self, context: dict, intent: str) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Describe what can be analysed with currently connected data.\"\"\"\n        parts = []\n        if context.get(\"has_credit\"):\n            parts.append(\"Credit score assessment, credit utilization, tradeline analysis, delinquency check\")\n        if context.get(\"has_bank\"):\n            parts.append(\"Cash flow patterns, average daily balance, income stability, NSF/overdraft check\")\n        if context.get(\"has_qb\"):\n            parts.append(\"Revenue verification, P&L analysis, DSCR calculation, balance sheet ratios\")\n        if not parts:\n            parts.append(\"General loan product education and typical qualification criteria\")\n        return \"; \".join(parts)\n\n    def _describe_unavailable_analysis(self, missing_keys: list[str], intent: str) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Describe what requires the missing data sources.\"\"\"\n        descriptions = {\n            \"credit\":     \"credit score check, credit-based product eligibility, rate estimation based on creditworthiness\",\n            \"bank\":       \"cash flow analysis, average balance verification, NSF/overdraft risk assessment\",\n            \"quickbooks\": \"revenue verification, DSCR calculation, P&L-based qualification, financial ratio analysis\",\n        }\n        parts = [descriptions[k] for k in missing_keys if k in descriptions]\n        return \"; \".join(parts) if parts else \"Personalised qualification analysis\"\n\n    def build_qualification_prompt(\n        self,\n        context: dict[str, Any],\n        desired_loan_type: str,\n        desired_amount: float,\n        loan_purpose: str = \"\",\n    ) -> str:\n        \"\"\"\n        Assemble a full qualification analysis prompt with all available data.\n        Fills the qualification_prompt.txt template with pre-processed values.\n        \"\"\"\n        template = _load_prompt(\"qualification_prompt.txt\")\n\n        company = context.get(\"company\") or {}\n        financials = context.get(\"financials\") or {}\n        personal_credit = context.get(\"credit_personal\") or {}\n        business_credit = context.get(\"credit_business\") or {}\n        bank = context.get(\"bank_data\") or {}\n        cash_flow = bank.get(\"cash_flow_analysis\") or {}\n        snapshots = bank.get(\"monthly_snapshots\") or []\n\n        avg_daily_balance = 0\n        nsf_count = 0\n        if snapshots:\n            avg_daily_balance = sum(s.get(\"average_daily_balance\", 0) for s in snapshots) / len(snapshots)\n            nsf_count = sum(s.get(\"nsf_overdraft_count\", 0) for s in snapshots)\n\n        from datetime import datetime\n        _now_year = datetime.now().year\n        try:\n            year_established = company.get(\"year_established\")\n            if year_established is None:\n                year_established = _now_year\n            else:\n                year_established = int(str(year_established)[:4])\n        except (TypeError, ValueError):\n            year_established = _now_year\n        years_in_business = _now_year - year_established\n\n        annual_revenue = financials.get(\"revenue\", 0)\n        net_income = financials.get(\"net_income\", 0)\n        total_debt = personal_credit.get(\"total_debt\", 0)\n\n        def _num(v: Any) -> float:\n            if v is None:\n                return 0.0\n            try:\n                return float(v)\n            except (TypeError, ValueError):\n                return 0.0\n\n        monthly_debt_service = sum(\n            _num(t.get(\"monthly_payment\"))\n            for t in personal_credit.get(\"tradelines\", [])\n            if t.get(\"status\") != \"closed\"\n        )\n        dscr = round(net_income / 12 / monthly_debt_service, 2) if monthly_debt_service > 0 else 99.0\n\n        products = context.get(\"loan_products_engine\") or []\n        qual_results = self.qualification_engine.qualify(context, products, desired_loan_type, desired_amount)\n        matched_lenders = self.qualification_engine.match_lenders(context, desired_loan_type)\n\n        qual_text = self._format_qualification_results(qual_results)\n        lender_text = self._format_matched_lenders(matched_lenders)\n\n        public_records = personal_credit.get(\"public_records\", [])\n        pr_summary = \"None\" if not public_records else \"; \".join(\n            f\"{r.get('type', 'unknown')} ({r.get('status', 'unknown')}, ${r.get('amount', 0):,.0f})\"\n            for r in public_records\n        )\n\n        try:\n            filled = template.format(\n                company_name=company.get(\"company_name\", \"Unknown\"),\n                industry=company.get(\"industry\", \"Unknown\"),\n                naics_code=company.get(\"naics_code\", \"N/A\"),\n                year_established=year_established,\n                years_in_business=years_in_business,\n                employees=company.get(\"employees\", \"N/A\"),\n                city=company.get(\"city\", \"N/A\"),\n                state=company.get(\"state\", \"N/A\"),\n                credit_bureau=personal_credit.get(\"bureau\", \"N/A\"),\n                credit_pull_date=personal_credit.get(\"pull_date\", \"N/A\"),\n                fico_score=personal_credit.get(\"fico_score\", \"N/A\"),\n                credit_utilization=personal_credit.get(\"credit_utilization\", \"N/A\"),\n                total_debt=total_debt,\n                tradeline_count=len(personal_credit.get(\"tradelines\", [])),\n                delinquent_count=personal_credit.get(\"delinquencies\", 0),\n                inquiries_12mo=personal_credit.get(\"inquiries_last_12_months\", 0),\n                public_records_summary=pr_summary,\n                paydex_score=business_credit.get(\"dnb_paydex\", \"N/A\"),\n                intelliscore=business_credit.get(\"experian_intelliscore\", \"N/A\"),\n                bank_refresh_date=bank.get(\"last_refresh\", \"N/A\"),\n                primary_balance=bank.get(\"accounts\", [{}])[0].get(\"current_balance\", 0) if bank.get(\"accounts\") else 0,\n                avg_monthly_deposits=cash_flow.get(\"average_monthly_income\", 0),\n                avg_monthly_withdrawals=cash_flow.get(\"average_monthly_expenses\", 0),\n                avg_daily_balance=avg_daily_balance,\n                nsf_count=nsf_count,\n                cash_flow_score=bank.get(\"cash_flow_score\", \"N/A\"),\n                seasonality_index=cash_flow.get(\"seasonality_index\", \"N/A\"),\n                income_volatility=cash_flow.get(\"income_volatility\", \"N/A\"),\n                financial_period=financials.get(\"period\", \"N/A\"),\n                annual_revenue=annual_revenue,\n                net_income=net_income,\n                profit_margin=financials.get(\"profit_margin\", 0),\n                revenue_growth=financials.get(\"revenue_growth_yoy\", 0),\n                current_ratio=financials.get(\"current_ratio\", 0),\n                debt_to_equity=financials.get(\"debt_to_equity\", 0),\n                cash_on_hand=financials.get(\"cash_on_hand\", 0),\n                monthly_burn_rate=financials.get(\"monthly_burn_rate\", 0),\n                accounts_receivable=financials.get(\"accounts_receivable\", 0),\n                dscr=dscr,\n                readiness_score=context.get(\"readiness_score\", {}).get(\"overall\", \"N/A\") if context.get(\"readiness_score\") else \"N/A\",\n                max_qualified_amount=context.get(\"readiness_score\", {}).get(\"max_loan_amount\", 0) if context.get(\"readiness_score\") else 0,\n                desired_loan_type=desired_loan_type,\n                desired_amount=desired_amount,\n                loan_purpose=loan_purpose or \"Not specified\",\n                qualification_results=qual_text,\n                matched_lenders=lender_text,\n            )\n        except KeyError as e:\n            filled = f\"[Context assembly error: missing field {e}. Partial data available.]\"\n\n        return filled\n\n    def build_gap_coaching_prompt(self, context: dict[str, Any], gaps: list[dict]) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Assemble gap coaching prompt with specific gap details.\"\"\"\n        template = _load_prompt(\"gap_coaching_prompt.txt\")\n        financials = context.get(\"financials\") or {}\n        personal_credit = context.get(\"credit_personal\") or {}\n        cash_flow = (context.get(\"bank_data\") or {}).get(\"cash_flow_analysis\") or {}\n\n        gap_text = \"\\n\".join(\n            f\"  - {g.get('criterion', 'Unknown')}: Current={g.get('current')} | Required={g.get('required')} | Gap={g.get('gap_description', '')}\"\n            for g in gaps\n        )\n\n        return template.format(\n            gaps=gap_text or \"No specific gaps identified\",\n            fico_score=personal_credit.get(\"fico_score\", \"N/A\"),\n            needed_fico=\"varies by product\",\n            annual_revenue=financials.get(\"revenue\", 0),\n            needed_revenue=\"varies by product\",\n            dscr=\"N/A\",\n            needed_dscr=\"varies by product\",\n            months_in_business=\"N/A\",\n            needed_months=\"varies by product\",\n            credit_utilization=personal_credit.get(\"credit_utilization\", \"N/A\"),\n            debt_to_equity=financials.get(\"debt_to_equity\", \"N/A\"),\n            max_debt_to_equity=\"varies by product\",\n            avg_monthly_income=cash_flow.get(\"average_monthly_income\", 0),\n            avg_monthly_expenses=cash_flow.get(\"average_monthly_expenses\", 0),\n            top_expense_categories=\"See bank feed data\",\n            reducible_expenses=\"Analysis pending\",\n            seasonal_notes=f\"Seasonality index: {cash_flow.get('seasonality_index', 'N/A')}\",\n        )\n\n    def build_cross_sell_prompt(self, opportunities: list[dict]) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Assemble cross-sell prompt with detected savings opportunities.\"\"\"\n        template = _load_prompt(\"cross_sell_prompt.txt\")\n\n        opp_text = \"\\n\".join(\n            f\"  - {o.get('type', 'Unknown')}: {o.get('description', '')} | \"\n            f\"Estimated savings: ${o.get('estimated_savings', 0):,.0f}/year | \"\n            f\"Current spend: ${o.get('current_spend', 0):,.0f}/year | \"\n            f\"Benchmark: ${o.get('benchmark_spend', 0):,.0f}/year\"\n            for o in opportunities\n        )\n\n        return template.format(opportunities=opp_text or \"No opportunities detected\")\n\n    def get_data_availability_summary(self, context: dict[str, Any]) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Summarize what data is available for this SMB.\"\"\"\n        parts = []\n        if context.get(\"has_qb\"):\n            parts.append(\"QuickBooks financials (revenue, P&L, balance sheet)\")\n        if context.get(\"has_credit\"):\n            parts.append(\"Credit bureau reports (personal + business)\")\n        if context.get(\"has_bank\"):\n            parts.append(\"Bank feed data from Plaid (transactions, cash flow)\")\n\n        if not parts:\n            return \"No financial data connected yet. I can still help with general questions about loan types and qualification requirements.\"\n\n        return \"Available data: \" + \", \".join(parts)\n\n    def _format_qualification_results(self, results: dict) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Format qualification results for prompt injection.\"\"\"\n        if not results:\n            return \"No qualification results computed\"\n\n        lines = []\n        for _key, result in results.items():\n            product_name = result.get(\"product_name\") or _key\n            status = \"QUALIFIED\" if result.get(\"qualifies\") else \"NOT QUALIFIED\"\n            lines.append(f\"  {product_name}: {status}\")\n            if result.get(\"gaps\"):\n                for gap in result[\"gaps\"]:\n                    lines.append(f\"    - Gap: {gap}\")\n            if result.get(\"match_score\"):\n                lines.append(f\"    Match score: {result['match_score']}%\")\n        return \"\\n\".join(lines)\n\n    def _format_matched_lenders(self, lenders: list[dict]) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Format matched lenders for prompt injection.\"\"\"\n        if not lenders:\n            return \"No lenders matched\"\n\n        lines = []\n        for l in lenders[:10]:\n            name = l.get(\"name\", \"Unknown\")\n            score = l.get(\"match_score\", 0)\n            qualifies = \"YES\" if l.get(\"qualifies\") else \"NO\"\n            rate = l.get(\"rate_range\", \"N/A\")\n            lines.append(f\"  {name}: Match={score}% | Qualifies={qualifies} | Rate={rate}\")\n            if l.get(\"gaps\"):\n                for gap in l[\"gaps\"][:3]:\n                    lines.append(f\"    - {gap}\")\n        return \"\\n\".join(lines)\n", "numLines": 692, "startLine": 1, "totalLines": 692}}

"""
Context Builder — Assembles pre-processed financial data into structured
prompts for LLM reasoning.

ARCHITECTURE PRINCIPLE:
The LLM is the reasoning layer ONLY. All financial data — credit scores,
bank transactions, categorization, DSCR, qualification matching — is computed
deterministically in the data layer and injected into the LLM prompt as
structured context. The LLM never fetches or computes financial data itself.

New in this version:
  - build_initial_context_for_user(user_id): queries real MongoDB data via
    analytics services for an authenticated user (replaces company_id approach)
  - get_missing_data_response(context, intent): returns structured info about
    which data sources are missing for a given intent
"""

import logging
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Callable, Optional

from agent.services.loanproducts.service import get_all_catalog_products, loan_product_to_engine_dict
from agent.tools.credit_bureau import CreditBureauService
from agent.tools.plaid_bank import PlaidBankService
from agent.tools.quickbooks import QuickBooksService
from agent.tools.qualification_engine import QualificationEngine
from agent.prompts.prompt_manager import prompt_manager
from agent.core.config import settings

logger = logging.getLogger("loangen.context_builder")

PROMPTS_DIR = Path(__file__).parent / "prompts"

# ── Intent → required data sources mapping ────────────────────────────────────
# Which data sources must be connected for a complete answer per intent.
INTENT_DATA_REQUIREMENTS: dict[str, list[str]] = {
    "qb_financials": ["quickbooks"],
    "qualification": ["credit", "quickbooks"],
    "gap_coaching":  ["credit", "quickbooks", "bank"],
    "cross_sell":    ["bank", "quickbooks"],
    "comparison":    [],   # general knowledge, no user data required
    "general":       [],   # general knowledge, no user data required
}

# ── Source display names and dashboard routes ─────────────────────────────────
SOURCE_META: dict[str, dict] = {
    "credit": {
        "label":    "Credit Report",
        "cta":      "Connect Credit Bureau",
        "route":    "/user/dashboard?connect=credit",
        "why":      "Your credit score and tradelines determine which loan products you qualify for and at what rates.",
    },
    "bank": {
        "label":    "Bank Account",
        "cta":      "Connect Bank Account",
        "route":    "/user/dashboard?connect=bank",
        "why":      "Bank transaction data shows your cash flow patterns, average balances, and financial stability.",
    },
    "quickbooks": {
        "label":    "QuickBooks",
        "cta":      "Connect QuickBooks",
        "route":    "/user/dashboard?connect=quickbooks",
        "why":      "QuickBooks provides your revenue, P&L, and balance sheet data needed to calculate DSCR and revenue-based qualification.",
    },
}


def _load_prompt(name: str) -> str:
    return (PROMPTS_DIR / name).read_text()


class ContextBuilder:
    """
    Fetches data from external services (Plaid, credit bureaus, QuickBooks)
    and assembles it into structured context strings for LLM prompts.

    The LLM receives pre-processed summaries, never raw data.
    Data categorization (e.g., Plaid transaction categories) is done by
    the respective service's own models, not the LLM.
    """

    def __init__(self):
        self.credit_service = CreditBureauService()
        self.plaid_service = PlaidBankService()
        self.qb_service = QuickBooksService()
        self.qualification_engine = QualificationEngine()

    async def build_initial_context(self, company_id: str | None) -> dict[str, Any]:
        """
        Build the initial context bundle when an SMB connects.
        Returns a dict with all available pre-processed data.
        """
        context: dict[str, Any] = {
            "company_id": company_id,
            "has_qb": False,
            "has_credit": False,
            "has_bank": False,
            "company": None,
            "financials": None,
            "credit_personal": None,
            "credit_business": None,
            "bank_data": None,
            "readiness_score": None,
            "loan_products_engine": [],
        }

        if not company_id:
            return context

        products_doc = await get_all_catalog_products()
        context["loan_products_engine"] = [loan_product_to_engine_dict(p) for p in products_doc]

        company = await self.qb_service.get_company(company_id)
        if company:
            context["has_qb"] = True
            context["company"] = company
            context["financials"] = await self.qb_service.get_financials(company_id)
            context["readiness_score"] = await self.qb_service.get_readiness_score(company_id)

        credit = await self.credit_service.get_reports(company_id)
        if credit:
            context["has_credit"] = True
            context["credit_personal"] = credit.get("personal")
            context["credit_business"] = credit.get("business")

        bank = await self.plaid_service.get_bank_data(company_id)
        if bank:
            context["has_bank"] = True
            context["bank_data"] = bank

        return context

    async def build_initial_context_for_user(
        self,
        user_id: str,
        db_debug_hook: Optional[Callable[[str, dict], None]] = None,
    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
        """Build context using real MongoDB data for an authenticated user.

        This is the production replacement for build_initial_context() which
        used a company_id and mock services. This method queries the actual
        analytics services (CreditBureauAnalyticsService, PlaidAnalyticsService,
        QuickBooksAnalyticsService) using the user's MongoDB ObjectId.

        Returns:
            Context dict with has_credit / has_bank / has_qb flags, all
            available financial data, and a missing_sources list.
        """
        context: dict[str, Any] = {
            "user_id":         user_id,
            "has_qb":          False,
            "has_credit":      False,
            "has_bank":        False,
            "company":         None,
            "financials":      None,
            "credit_personal": None,
            "credit_business": None,
            "bank_data":       None,
            "readiness_score": None,
            "missing_sources": [],   # list of source keys: "credit" | "bank" | "quickbooks"
        }

        # ── 1. Credit data (Array via MongoDB analytics) ───────────────────────
        try:
            from agent.analytics.services.credit_bureau_analytics import CreditBureauAnalyticsService
            credit_svc = CreditBureauAnalyticsService(live=settings.data_mode == "live")
            credit_result = await credit_svc.get_analytics(
                user_id,
                debug_hook=db_debug_hook,
            )
            if credit_result:
                context["has_credit"] = True
                context["credit_personal"] = self._map_credit_analytics(credit_result)
                logger.debug(f"Credit data loaded for user={user_id}")
            else:
                context["missing_sources"].append("credit")
                logger.debug(f"No credit data for user={user_id}")
        except Exception as e:
            logger.warning(f"Credit analytics unavailable for user={user_id}: {e}")
            context["missing_sources"].append("credit")

        # ── 2. Bank data (Plaid via MongoDB analytics) ─────────────────────────
        try:
            from agent.analytics.services.plaid_analytics import PlaidAnalyticsService
            bank_svc = PlaidAnalyticsService(live=settings.data_mode == "live")
            bank_result = await bank_svc.get_analytics(
                smb_id=user_id,
                user_id=user_id,
                debug_hook=db_debug_hook,
            )
            if bank_result:
                context["has_bank"] = True
                context["bank_data"] = self._map_bank_analytics(bank_result)
                logger.debug(f"Bank data loaded for user={user_id}")
            else:
                context["missing_sources"].append("bank")
                logger.debug(f"No bank data for user={user_id}")
        except Exception as e:
            logger.warning(f"Bank analytics unavailable for user={user_id}: {e}")
            context["missing_sources"].append("bank")

        # ── 3. QuickBooks data (via MongoDB analytics) ─────────────────────────
        try:
            from agent.analytics.services.quickbooks_analytics import QuickBooksAnalyticsService
            qb_svc = QuickBooksAnalyticsService(live=settings.data_mode == "live")
            qb_result = await qb_svc.get_analytics(
                user_id,
                debug_hook=db_debug_hook,
            )
            if qb_result:
                context["has_qb"] = True
                context["company"]    = self._map_qb_company(qb_result)
                context["financials"] = self._map_qb_financials(qb_result)
                logger.debug(f"QuickBooks data loaded for user={user_id}")
            else:
                context["missing_sources"].append("quickbooks")
                logger.debug(f"No QuickBooks data for user={user_id}")
        except Exception as e:
            logger.warning(f"QB analytics unavailable for user={user_id}: {e}")
            context["missing_sources"].append("quickbooks")

        logger.info(
            f"Context built for user={user_id} — "
            f"credit={context['has_credit']}  bank={context['has_bank']}  qb={context['has_qb']}  "
            f"missing={context['missing_sources']}"
        )
        if db_debug_hook:
            try:
                db_debug_hook(
                    "context_builder.context_ready",
                    {"user_id": user_id, "context": context},
                )
            except Exception:
                pass
        return context

    def get_missing_data_response(
        self,
        context: dict[str, Any],
        intent: str,
    ) -> Optional[dict]:
        """Check whether the intent requires data sources that are not connected.

        Returns a structured dict if required data is missing, or None if all
        required sources are available (meaning normal enrichment can proceed).

        Args:
            context: The context dict from build_initial_context_for_user().
            intent: Detected intent string (qualification, gap_coaching, etc.)

        Returns:
            None if no data is missing for this intent.
            Dict with:
              - "missing_sources": list of {label, cta, route, why}
              - "connected_sources": human-readable list of connected sources
              - "partial_data_available": bool
              - "prompt_block": rendered missing_data_prompt for LLM injection
        """
        required = INTENT_DATA_REQUIREMENTS.get(intent, [])
        missing_keys = context.get("missing_sources", [])

        # Which required sources are actually missing?
        missing_required = [k for k in required if k in missing_keys]
        if not missing_required:
            return None   # All required data is available — proceed normally

        # Build the response structure
        missing_sources = [SOURCE_META[k] for k in missing_required if k in SOURCE_META]

        connected_keys = [k for k in ["credit", "bank", "quickbooks"] if k not in missing_keys]
        connected_names = [SOURCE_META[k]["label"] for k in connected_keys if k in SOURCE_META]

        # Describe what can and can't be analysed
        available_analysis = self._describe_available_analysis(context, intent)
        unavailable_analysis = self._describe_unavailable_analysis(missing_required, intent)

        # Render the prompt block to inject into LLM messages
        prompt_block = prompt_manager.get_missing_data_prompt(
            connected_sources=", ".join(connected_names) if connected_names else "None",
            missing_sources=", ".join(s["label"] for s in missing_sources),
            available_analysis=available_analysis,
            unavailable_analysis=unavailable_analysis,
        )

        return {
            "missing_sources":       missing_sources,
            "connected_sources":     connected_names,
            "partial_data_available": len(connected_keys) > 0,
            "prompt_block":          prompt_block,
        }

    def get_data_source_status(self, context: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, bool]:
        """Return a simple dict of connected status for all three sources."""
        return {
            "credit":     context.get("has_credit", False),
            "bank":       context.get("has_bank", False),
            "quickbooks": context.get("has_qb", False),
        }

    # ── Analytics result mappers ───────────────────────────────────────────────
    # These convert the structured analytics results into the flat dict format
    # that build_qualification_prompt / build_gap_coaching_prompt expect.

    def _map_credit_analytics(self, result: Any) -> dict:
        """Map CreditBureauAnalyticsService result to context dict format."""
        if hasattr(result, "model_dump"):
            d = result.model_dump()
        elif isinstance(result, dict):
            d = result
        else:
            return {}

        return {
            "fico_score":           d.get("credit_score") or d.get("fico_score"),
            "bureau":               d.get("bureau", "Experian"),
            "pull_date":            d.get("pull_date") or d.get("report_date"),
            "credit_utilization":   d.get("credit_utilization") or d.get("utilization_rate"),
            "total_debt":           d.get("total_balance") or d.get("total_debt", 0),
            "tradelines":           d.get("tradelines", []),
            "delinquencies":        d.get("delinquent_accounts") or d.get("delinquencies", 0),
            "inquiries_last_12_months": d.get("hard_inquiries") or d.get("inquiries_12mo", 0),
            "public_records":       d.get("public_records", []),
        }

    def _map_bank_analytics(self, result: Any) -> dict:
        """Map PlaidAnalyticsService result to context dict format."""
        if hasattr(result, "model_dump"):
            d = result.model_dump()
        elif isinstance(result, dict):
            d = result
        else:
            return {}

        return {
            "accounts":       d.get("accounts", []),
            "last_refresh":   d.get("last_synced") or d.get("last_refresh"),
            "cash_flow_score": d.get("cash_flow_score"),
            "cash_flow_analysis": {
                "average_monthly_income": (
                    d.get("avg_monthly_inflow")
                    or (d.get("cash_flow_metrics") or {}).get("avg_monthly_inflow")
                    or d.get("average_monthly_income", 0)
                ),
                "average_monthly_expenses": (
                    d.get("avg_monthly_outflow")
                    or (d.get("cash_flow_metrics") or {}).get("avg_monthly_outflow")
                    or d.get("average_monthly_expenses", 0)
                ),
                "seasonality_index":        d.get("seasonality_index"),
                "income_volatility": (
                    d.get("income_volatility")
                    or (d.get("cash_flow_metrics") or {}).get("inflow_volatility_pct")
                ),
            },
            "monthly_snapshots": d.get("monthly_snapshots", []),
            "monthly_cash_flows": d.get("monthly_cash_flows", []),
            "expense_categories": d.get("expense_categories", []),
            "income_categories": d.get("income_categories", []),
            "total_transactions": d.get("total_transactions", 0),
            "date_range_start": d.get("date_range_start"),
            "date_range_end": d.get("date_range_end"),
            "risk_flags":        d.get("risk_flags", []),
        }

    def _map_qb_company(self, result: Any) -> dict:
        """Map QuickBooksAnalyticsService result to company dict."""
        if hasattr(result, "model_dump"):
            d = result.model_dump()
        elif isinstance(result, dict):
            d = result
        else:
            return {}

        company = d.get("company_profile") or d.get("company") or {}
        if hasattr(company, "model_dump"):
            company = company.model_dump()
        return {
            "company_name":    company.get("company_name") or d.get("company_name"),
            "industry":        company.get("industry"),
            "naics_code":      company.get("naics_code"),
            "year_established": company.get("start_date") or company.get("fiscal_year_start_month"),
            "employees":       company.get("employee_count"),
            "city":            company.get("city"),
            "state":           company.get("state"),
        }

    def _map_qb_financials(self, result: Any) -> dict:
        """Map QuickBooksAnalyticsService result to financials dict.

        QBAnalyticsResult uses income_statement.total_income (not total_revenue),
        balance_sheet.cash_and_bank, and top-level revenue, net_income, dscr, etc.
        """
        if hasattr(result, "model_dump"):
            d = result.model_dump()
        elif isinstance(result, dict):
            d = result
        else:
            return {}

        income = d.get("income_statement") or {}
        balance = d.get("balance_sheet") or {}
        ratios = d.get("key_metrics") or {}

        revenue = (
            income.get("total_income")
            or income.get("total_revenue")
            or income.get("revenue")
            or d.get("revenue", 0)
        )
        net_income = income.get("net_income") or d.get("net_income", 0)
        profit_margin = (
            income.get("profit_margin_pct")
            or income.get("profit_margin")
            or d.get("profit_margin", 0)
        )
        current_ratio = (
            balance.get("current_ratio")
            or ratios.get("current_ratio")
            or d.get("current_ratio", 0)
        )
        debt_to_equity = (
            balance.get("debt_to_equity")
            or ratios.get("debt_to_equity")
            or d.get("debt_to_equity", 0)
        )
        cash_on_hand = (
            balance.get("cash_and_bank")
            or balance.get("cash")
            or balance.get("cash_on_hand")
            or d.get("cash_on_hand", 0)
        )
        dscr = d.get("dscr") or ratios.get("dscr")
        runway_months = d.get("runway_months") or ratios.get("runway_months")

        return {
            "period": income.get("period"),
            "revenue": revenue,
            "net_income": net_income,
            "profit_margin": profit_margin,
            "revenue_growth_yoy": income.get("revenue_growth_yoy") or d.get("revenue_growth_yoy", 0),
            "current_ratio": current_ratio,
            "debt_to_equity": debt_to_equity,
            "cash_on_hand": cash_on_hand,
            "monthly_burn_rate": income.get("monthly_burn_rate") or d.get("monthly_burn_rate", 0),
            "accounts_receivable": balance.get("accounts_receivable") or d.get("accounts_receivable", 0),
            "dscr": dscr,
            "runway_months": runway_months,
        }

    def _describe_available_analysis(self, context: dict, intent: str) -> str:
        """Describe what can be analysed with currently connected data."""
        parts = []
        if context.get("has_credit"):
            parts.append("Credit score assessment, credit utilization, tradeline analysis, delinquency check")
        if context.get("has_bank"):
            parts.append("Cash flow patterns, average daily balance, income stability, NSF/overdraft check")
        if context.get("has_qb"):
            parts.append("Revenue verification, P&L analysis, DSCR calculation, balance sheet ratios")
        if not parts:
            parts.append("General loan product education and typical qualification criteria")
        return "; ".join(parts)

    def _describe_unavailable_analysis(self, missing_keys: list[str], intent: str) -> str:
        """Describe what requires the missing data sources."""
        descriptions = {
            "credit":     "credit score check, credit-based product eligibility, rate estimation based on creditworthiness",
            "bank":       "cash flow analysis, average balance verification, NSF/overdraft risk assessment",
            "quickbooks": "revenue verification, DSCR calculation, P&L-based qualification, financial ratio analysis",
        }
        parts = [descriptions[k] for k in missing_keys if k in descriptions]
        return "; ".join(parts) if parts else "Personalised qualification analysis"

    def build_qualification_prompt(
        self,
        context: dict[str, Any],
        desired_loan_type: str,
        desired_amount: float,
        loan_purpose: str = "",
    ) -> str:
        """
        Assemble a full qualification analysis prompt with all available data.
        Fills the qualification_prompt.txt template with pre-processed values.
        """
        template = _load_prompt("qualification_prompt.txt")

        company = context.get("company") or {}
        financials = context.get("financials") or {}
        personal_credit = context.get("credit_personal") or {}
        business_credit = context.get("credit_business") or {}
        bank = context.get("bank_data") or {}
        cash_flow = bank.get("cash_flow_analysis") or {}
        snapshots = bank.get("monthly_snapshots") or []

        avg_daily_balance = 0
        nsf_count = 0
        if snapshots:
            avg_daily_balance = sum(s.get("average_daily_balance", 0) for s in snapshots) / len(snapshots)
            nsf_count = sum(s.get("nsf_overdraft_count", 0) for s in snapshots)

        from datetime import datetime
        _now_year = datetime.now().year
        try:
            year_established = company.get("year_established")
            if year_established is None:
                year_established = _now_year
            else:
                year_established = int(str(year_established)[:4])
        except (TypeError, ValueError):
            year_established = _now_year
        years_in_business = _now_year - year_established

        annual_revenue = financials.get("revenue", 0)
        net_income = financials.get("net_income", 0)
        total_debt = personal_credit.get("total_debt", 0)

        def _num(v: Any) -> float:
            if v is None:
                return 0.0
            try:
                return float(v)
            except (TypeError, ValueError):
                return 0.0

        monthly_debt_service = sum(
            _num(t.get("monthly_payment"))
            for t in personal_credit.get("tradelines", [])
            if t.get("status") != "closed"
        )
        dscr = round(net_income / 12 / monthly_debt_service, 2) if monthly_debt_service > 0 else 99.0

        products = context.get("loan_products_engine") or []
        qual_results = self.qualification_engine.qualify(context, products, desired_loan_type, desired_amount)
        matched_lenders = self.qualification_engine.match_lenders(context, desired_loan_type)

        qual_text = self._format_qualification_results(qual_results)
        lender_text = self._format_matched_lenders(matched_lenders)

        public_records = personal_credit.get("public_records", [])
        pr_summary = "None" if not public_records else "; ".join(
            f"{r.get('type', 'unknown')} ({r.get('status', 'unknown')}, ${r.get('amount', 0):,.0f})"
            for r in public_records
        )

        try:
            filled = template.format(
                company_name=company.get("company_name", "Unknown"),
                industry=company.get("industry", "Unknown"),
                naics_code=company.get("naics_code", "N/A"),
                year_established=year_established,
                years_in_business=years_in_business,
                employees=company.get("employees", "N/A"),
                city=company.get("city", "N/A"),
                state=company.get("state", "N/A"),
                credit_bureau=personal_credit.get("bureau", "N/A"),
                credit_pull_date=personal_credit.get("pull_date", "N/A"),
                fico_score=personal_credit.get("fico_score", "N/A"),
                credit_utilization=personal_credit.get("credit_utilization", "N/A"),
                total_debt=total_debt,
                tradeline_count=len(personal_credit.get("tradelines", [])),
                delinquent_count=personal_credit.get("delinquencies", 0),
                inquiries_12mo=personal_credit.get("inquiries_last_12_months", 0),
                public_records_summary=pr_summary,
                paydex_score=business_credit.get("dnb_paydex", "N/A"),
                intelliscore=business_credit.get("experian_intelliscore", "N/A"),
                bank_refresh_date=bank.get("last_refresh", "N/A"),
                primary_balance=bank.get("accounts", [{}])[0].get("current_balance", 0) if bank.get("accounts") else 0,
                avg_monthly_deposits=cash_flow.get("average_monthly_income", 0),
                avg_monthly_withdrawals=cash_flow.get("average_monthly_expenses", 0),
                avg_daily_balance=avg_daily_balance,
                nsf_count=nsf_count,
                cash_flow_score=bank.get("cash_flow_score", "N/A"),
                seasonality_index=cash_flow.get("seasonality_index", "N/A"),
                income_volatility=cash_flow.get("income_volatility", "N/A"),
                financial_period=financials.get("period", "N/A"),
                annual_revenue=annual_revenue,
                net_income=net_income,
                profit_margin=financials.get("profit_margin", 0),
                revenue_growth=financials.get("revenue_growth_yoy", 0),
                current_ratio=financials.get("current_ratio", 0),
                debt_to_equity=financials.get("debt_to_equity", 0),
                cash_on_hand=financials.get("cash_on_hand", 0),
                monthly_burn_rate=financials.get("monthly_burn_rate", 0),
                accounts_receivable=financials.get("accounts_receivable", 0),
                dscr=dscr,
                readiness_score=context.get("readiness_score", {}).get("overall", "N/A") if context.get("readiness_score") else "N/A",
                max_qualified_amount=context.get("readiness_score", {}).get("max_loan_amount", 0) if context.get("readiness_score") else 0,
                desired_loan_type=desired_loan_type,
                desired_amount=desired_amount,
                loan_purpose=loan_purpose or "Not specified",
                qualification_results=qual_text,
                matched_lenders=lender_text,
            )
        except KeyError as e:
            filled = f"[Context assembly error: missing field {e}. Partial data available.]"

        return filled

    def build_gap_coaching_prompt(self, context: dict[str, Any], gaps: list[dict]) -> str:
        """Assemble gap coaching prompt with specific gap details."""
        template = _load_prompt("gap_coaching_prompt.txt")
        financials = context.get("financials") or {}
        personal_credit = context.get("credit_personal") or {}
        cash_flow = (context.get("bank_data") or {}).get("cash_flow_analysis") or {}

        gap_text = "\n".join(
            f"  - {g.get('criterion', 'Unknown')}: Current={g.get('current')} | Required={g.get('required')} | Gap={g.get('gap_description', '')}"
            for g in gaps
        )

        return template.format(
            gaps=gap_text or "No specific gaps identified",
            fico_score=personal_credit.get("fico_score", "N/A"),
            needed_fico="varies by product",
            annual_revenue=financials.get("revenue", 0),
            needed_revenue="varies by product",
            dscr="N/A",
            needed_dscr="varies by product",
            months_in_business="N/A",
            needed_months="varies by product",
            credit_utilization=personal_credit.get("credit_utilization", "N/A"),
            debt_to_equity=financials.get("debt_to_equity", "N/A"),
            max_debt_to_equity="varies by product",
            avg_monthly_income=cash_flow.get("average_monthly_income", 0),
            avg_monthly_expenses=cash_flow.get("average_monthly_expenses", 0),
            top_expense_categories="See bank feed data",
            reducible_expenses="Analysis pending",
            seasonal_notes=f"Seasonality index: {cash_flow.get('seasonality_index', 'N/A')}",
        )

    def build_cross_sell_prompt(self, opportunities: list[dict]) -> str:
        """Assemble cross-sell prompt with detected savings opportunities."""
        template = _load_prompt("cross_sell_prompt.txt")

        opp_text = "\n".join(
            f"  - {o.get('type', 'Unknown')}: {o.get('description', '')} | "
            f"Estimated savings: ${o.get('estimated_savings', 0):,.0f}/year | "
            f"Current spend: ${o.get('current_spend', 0):,.0f}/year | "
            f"Benchmark: ${o.get('benchmark_spend', 0):,.0f}/year"
            for o in opportunities
        )

        return template.format(opportunities=opp_text or "No opportunities detected")

    def get_data_availability_summary(self, context: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        """Summarize what data is available for this SMB."""
        parts = []
        if context.get("has_qb"):
            parts.append("QuickBooks financials (revenue, P&L, balance sheet)")
        if context.get("has_credit"):
            parts.append("Credit bureau reports (personal + business)")
        if context.get("has_bank"):
            parts.append("Bank feed data from Plaid (transactions, cash flow)")

        if not parts:
            return "No financial data connected yet. I can still help with general questions about loan types and qualification requirements."

        return "Available data: " + ", ".join(parts)

    def _format_qualification_results(self, results: dict) -> str:
        """Format qualification results for prompt injection."""
        if not results:
            return "No qualification results computed"

        lines = []
        for _key, result in results.items():
            product_name = result.get("product_name") or _key
            status = "QUALIFIED" if result.get("qualifies") else "NOT QUALIFIED"
            lines.append(f"  {product_name}: {status}")
            if result.get("gaps"):
                for gap in result["gaps"]:
                    lines.append(f"    - Gap: {gap}")
            if result.get("match_score"):
                lines.append(f"    Match score: {result['match_score']}%")
        return "\n".join(lines)

    def _format_matched_lenders(self, lenders: list[dict]) -> str:
        """Format matched lenders for prompt injection."""
        if not lenders:
            return "No lenders matched"

        lines = []
        for l in lenders[:10]:
            name = l.get("name", "Unknown")
            score = l.get("match_score", 0)
            qualifies = "YES" if l.get("qualifies") else "NO"
            rate = l.get("rate_range", "N/A")
            lines.append(f"  {name}: Match={score}% | Qualifies={qualifies} | Rate={rate}")
            if l.get("gaps"):
                for gap in l["gaps"][:3]:
                    lines.append(f"    - {gap}")
        return "\n".join(lines)

1	"""
2	Context Builder — Assembles pre-processed financial data into structured
3	prompts for LLM reasoning.
4	
5	ARCHITECTURE PRINCIPLE:
6	The LLM is the reasoning layer ONLY. All financial data — credit scores,
7	bank transactions, categorization, DSCR, qualification matching — is computed
8	deterministically in the data layer and injected into the LLM prompt as
9	structured context. The LLM never fetches or computes financial data itself.
10	
11	New in this version:
12	  - build_initial_context_for_user(user_id): queries real MongoDB data via
13	    analytics services for an authenticated user (replaces company_id approach)
14	  - get_missing_data_response(context, intent): returns structured info about
15	    which data sources are missing for a given intent
16	"""
17	
18	import logging
19	from pathlib import Path
20	from typing import Any, Callable, Optional
21	
22	from agent.services.loanproducts.service import get_all_catalog_products, loan_product_to_engine_dict
23	from agent.tools.credit_bureau import CreditBureauService
24	from agent.tools.plaid_bank import PlaidBankService
25	from agent.tools.quickbooks import QuickBooksService
26	from agent.tools.qualification_engine import QualificationEngine
27	from agent.prompts.prompt_manager import prompt_manager
28	from agent.core.config import settings
29	
30	logger = logging.getLogger("loangen.context_builder")
31	
32	PROMPTS_DIR = Path(__file__).parent / "prompts"
33	
34	# ── Intent → required data sources mapping ────────────────────────────────────
35	# Which data sources must be connected for a complete answer per intent.
36	INTENT_DATA_REQUIREMENTS: dict[str, list[str]] = {
37	    "qb_financials": ["quickbooks"],
38	    "qualification": ["credit", "quickbooks"],
39	    "gap_coaching":  ["credit", "quickbooks", "bank"],
40	    "cross_sell":    ["bank", "quickbooks"],
41	    "comparison":    [],   # general knowledge, no user data required
42	    "general":       [],   # general knowledge, no user data required
43	}
44	
45	# ── Source display names and dashboard routes ─────────────────────────────────
46	SOURCE_META: dict[str, dict] = {
47	    "credit": {
48	        "label":    "Credit Report",
49	        "cta":      "Connect Credit Bureau",
50	        "route":    "/user/dashboard?connect=credit",
51	        "why":      "Your credit score and tradelines determine which loan products you qualify for and at what rates.",
52	    },
53	    "bank": {
54	        "label":    "Bank Account",
55	        "cta":      "Connect Bank Account",
56	        "route":    "/user/dashboard?connect=bank",
57	        "why":      "Bank transaction data shows your cash flow patterns, average balances, and financial stability.",
58	    },
59	    "quickbooks": {
60	        "label":    "QuickBooks",
61	        "cta":      "Connect QuickBooks",
62	        "route":    "/user/dashboard?connect=quickbooks",
63	        "why":      "QuickBooks provides your revenue, P&L, and balance sheet data needed to calculate DSCR and revenue-based qualification.",
64	    },
65	}
66	
67	
68	def _load_prompt(name: str) -> str:
69	    return (PROMPTS_DIR / name).read_text()
70	
71	
72	class ContextBuilder:
73	    """
74	    Fetches data from external services (Plaid, credit bureaus, QuickBooks)
75	    and assembles it into structured context strings for LLM prompts.
76	
77	    The LLM receives pre-processed summaries, never raw data.
78	    Data categorization (e.g., Plaid transaction categories) is done by
79	    the respective service's own models, not the LLM.
80	    """
81	
82	    def __init__(self):
83	        self.credit_service = CreditBureauService()
84	        self.plaid_service = PlaidBankService()
85	        self.qb_service = QuickBooksService()
86	        self.qualification_engine = QualificationEngine()
87	
88	    async def build_initial_context(self, company_id: str | None) -> dict[str, Any]:
89	        """
90	        Build the initial context bundle when an SMB connects.
91	        Returns a dict with all available pre-processed data.
92	        """
93	        context: dict[str, Any] = {
94	            "company_id": company_id,
95	            "has_qb": False,
96	            "has_credit": False,
97	            "has_bank": False,
98	            "company": None,
99	            "financials": None,
100	            "credit_personal": None,
101	            "credit_business": None,
102	            "bank_data": None,
103	            "readiness_score": None,
104	            "loan_products_engine": [],
105	        }
106	
107	        if not company_id:
108	            return context
109	
110	        products_doc = await get_all_catalog_products()
111	        context["loan_products_engine"] = [loan_product_to_engine_dict(p) for p in products_doc]
112	
113	        company = await self.qb_service.get_company(company_id)
114	        if company:
115	            context["has_qb"] = True
116	            context["company"] = company
117	            context["financials"] = await self.qb_service.get_financials(company_id)
118	            context["readiness_score"] = await self.qb_service.get_readiness_score(company_id)
119	
120	        credit = await self.credit_service.get_reports(company_id)
121	        if credit:
122	            context["has_credit"] = True
123	            context["credit_personal"] = credit.get("personal")
124	            context["credit_business"] = credit.get("business")
125	
126	        bank = await self.plaid_service.get_bank_data(company_id)
127	        if bank:
128	            context["has_bank"] = True
129	            context["bank_data"] = bank
130	
131	        return context

133	    async def build_initial_context_for_user(
134	        self,
135	        user_id: str,
136	        db_debug_hook: Optional[Callable[[str, dict], None]] = None,
137	    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
138	        """Build context using real MongoDB data for an authenticated user.
139	
140	        This is the production replacement for build_initial_context() which
141	        used a company_id and mock services. This method queries the actual
142	        analytics services (CreditBureauAnalyticsService, PlaidAnalyticsService,
143	        QuickBooksAnalyticsService) using the user's MongoDB ObjectId.
144	
145	        Returns:
146	            Context dict with has_credit / has_bank / has_qb flags, all
147	            available financial data, and a missing_sources list.
148	        """
149	        context: dict[str, Any] = {
150	            "user_id":         user_id,
151	            "has_qb":          False,
152	            "has_credit":      False,
153	            "has_bank":        False,
154	            "company":         None,
155	            "financials":      None,
156	            "credit_personal": None,
157	            "credit_business": None,
158	            "bank_data":       None,
159	            "readiness_score": None,
160	            "missing_sources": [],   # list of source keys: "credit" | "bank" | "quickbooks"
161	        }
162	
163	        # ── 1. Credit data (Array via MongoDB analytics) ───────────────────────
164	        try:
165	            from agent.analytics.services.credit_bureau_analytics import CreditBureauAnalyticsService
166	            credit_svc = CreditBureauAnalyticsService(live=settings.data_mode == "live")
167	            credit_result = await credit_svc.get_analytics(
168	                user_id,
169	                debug_hook=db_debug_hook,
170	            )
171	            if credit_result:
172	                context["has_credit"] = True
173	                context["credit_personal"] = self._map_credit_analytics(credit_result)
174	                logger.debug(f"Credit data loaded for user={user_id}")
175	            else:
176	                context["missing_sources"].append("credit")
177	                logger.debug(f"No credit data for user={user_id}")
178	        except Exception as e:
179	            logger.warning(f"Credit analytics unavailable for user={user_id}: {e}")
180	            context["missing_sources"].append("credit")
181	
182	        # ── 2. Bank data (Plaid via MongoDB analytics) ─────────────────────────
183	        try:
184	            from agent.analytics.services.plaid_analytics import PlaidAnalyticsService
185	            bank_svc = PlaidAnalyticsService(live=settings.data_mode == "live")
186	            bank_result = await bank_svc.get_analytics(
187	                smb_id=user_id,
188	                user_id=user_id,
189	                debug_hook=db_debug_hook,
190	            )
191	            if bank_result:
192	                context["has_bank"] = True
193	                context["bank_data"] = self._map_bank_analytics(bank_result)
194	                logger.debug(f"Bank data loaded for user={user_id}")
195	            else:
196	                context["missing_sources"].append("bank")
197	                logger.debug(f"No bank data for user={user_id}")
198	        except Exception as e:
199	            logger.warning(f"Bank analytics unavailable for user={user_id}: {e}")
200	            context["missing_sources"].append("bank")
201	
202	        # ── 3. QuickBooks data (via MongoDB analytics) ─────────────────────────
203	        try:
204	            from agent.analytics.services.quickbooks_analytics import QuickBooksAnalyticsService
205	            qb_svc = QuickBooksAnalyticsService(live=settings.data_mode == "live")
206	            qb_result = await qb_svc.get_analytics(
207	                user_id,
208	                debug_hook=db_debug_hook,
209	            )
210	            if qb_result:
211	                context["has_qb"] = True
212	                context["company"]    = self._map_qb_company(qb_result)
213	                context["financials"] = self._map_qb_financials(qb_result)
214	                logger.debug(f"QuickBooks data loaded for user={user_id}")
215	            else:
216	                context["missing_sources"].append("quickbooks")
217	                logger.debug(f"No QuickBooks data for user={user_id}")
218	        except Exception as e:
219	            logger.warning(f"QB analytics unavailable for user={user_id}: {e}")
220	            context["missing_sources"].append("quickbooks")
221	
222	        logger.info(
223	            f"Context built for user={user_id} — "
224	            f"credit={context['has_credit']}  bank={context['has_bank']}  qb={context['has_qb']}  "
225	            f"missing={context['missing_sources']}"
226	        )
227	        if db_debug_hook:
228	            try:
229	                db_debug_hook(
230	                    "context_builder.context_ready",
231	                    {"user_id": user_id, "context": context},
232	                )
233	            except Exception:
234	                pass
235	        return context

237	    def get_missing_data_response(
238	        self,
239	        context: dict[str, Any],
240	        intent: str,
241	    ) -> Optional[dict]:
242	        """Check whether the intent requires data sources that are not connected.
243	
244	        Returns a structured dict if required data is missing, or None if all
245	        required sources are available (meaning normal enrichment can proceed).
246	
247	        Args:
248	            context: The context dict from build_initial_context_for_user().
249	            intent: Detected intent string (qualification, gap_coaching, etc.)
250	
251	        Returns:
252	            None if no data is missing for this intent.
253	            Dict with:
254	              - "missing_sources": list of {label, cta, route, why}
255	              - "connected_sources": human-readable list of connected sources
256	              - "partial_data_available": bool
257	              - "prompt_block": rendered missing_data_prompt for LLM injection
258	        """
259	        required = INTENT_DATA_REQUIREMENTS.get(intent, [])
260	        missing_keys = context.get("missing_sources", [])
261	
262	        # Which required sources are actually missing?
263	        missing_required = [k for k in required if k in missing_keys]
264	        if not missing_required:
265	            return None   # All required data is available — proceed normally
266	
267	        # Build the response structure
268	        missing_sources = [SOURCE_META[k] for k in missing_required if k in SOURCE_META]
269	
270	        connected_keys = [k for k in ["credit", "bank", "quickbooks"] if k not in missing_keys]
271	        connected_names = [SOURCE_META[k]["label"] for k in connected_keys if k in SOURCE_META]
272	
273	        # Describe what can and can't be analysed
274	        available_analysis = self._describe_available_analysis(context, intent)
275	        unavailable_analysis = self._describe_unavailable_analysis(missing_required, intent)
276	
277	        # Render the prompt block to inject into LLM messages
278	        prompt_block = prompt_manager.get_missing_data_prompt(
279	            connected_sources=", ".join(connected_names) if connected_names else "None",
280	            missing_sources=", ".join(s["label"] for s in missing_sources),
281	            available_analysis=available_analysis,
282	            unavailable_analysis=unavailable_analysis,
283	        )
284	
285	        return {
286	            "missing_sources":       missing_sources,
287	            "connected_sources":     connected_names,
288	            "partial_data_available": len(connected_keys) > 0,
289	            "prompt_block":          prompt_block,
290	        }
291	
292	    def get_data_source_status(self, context: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, bool]:
293	        """Return a simple dict of connected status for all three sources."""

295	            "credit":     context.get("has_credit", False),
296	            "bank":       context.get("has_bank", False),
297	            "quickbooks": context.get("has_qb", False),
298	        }

387	    def _map_qb_financials(self, result: Any) -> dict:
388	        """Map QuickBooksAnalyticsService result to financials dict.
389	
390	        QBAnalyticsResult uses income_statement.total_income (not total_revenue),
391	        balance_sheet.cash_and_bank, and top-level revenue, net_income, dscr, etc.
392	        """
393	        if hasattr(result, "model_dump"):
394	            d = result.model_dump()
395	        elif isinstance(result, dict):
396	            d = result
397	        else:
398	            return {}
399	
400	        income = d.get("income_statement") or {}
401	        balance = d.get("balance_sheet") or {}
402	        ratios = d.get("key_metrics") or {}
403	
404	        revenue = (
405	            income.get("total_income")
406	            or income.get("total_revenue")
407	            or income.get("revenue")
408	            or d.get("revenue", 0)
409	        )
410	        net_income = income.get("net_income") or d.get("net_income", 0)
411	        profit_margin = (
412	            income.get("profit_margin_pct")
413	            or income.get("profit_margin")
414	            or d.get("profit_margin", 0)
415	        )
416	        current_ratio = (
417	            balance.get("current_ratio")
418	            or ratios.get("current_ratio")
419	            or d.get("current_ratio", 0)
420	        )
421	        debt_to_equity = (
422	            balance.get("debt_to_equity")
423	            or ratios.get("debt_to_equity")
424	            or d.get("debt_to_equity", 0)
425	        )
426	        cash_on_hand = (
427	            balance.get("cash_and_bank")
428	            or balance.get("cash")
429	            or balance.get("cash_on_hand")
430	            or d.get("cash_on_hand", 0)
431	        )
432	        dscr = d.get("dscr") or ratios.get("dscr")
433	        runway_months = d.get("runway_months") or ratios.get("runway_months")
434	
435	        return {
436	            "period": income.get("period"),
437	            "revenue": revenue,
438	            "net_income": net_income,
439	            "profit_margin": profit_margin,
440	            "revenue_growth_yoy": income.get("revenue_growth_yoy") or d.get("revenue_growth_yoy", 0),
441	            "current_ratio": current_ratio,
442	            "debt_to_equity": debt_to_equity,
443	            "cash_on_hand": cash_on_hand,
444	            "monthly_burn_rate": income.get("monthly_burn_rate") or d.get("monthly_burn_rate", 0),
445	            "accounts_receivable": balance.get("accounts_receivable") or d.get("accounts_receivable", 0),
446	            "dscr": dscr,
447	            "runway_months": runway_months,
448	        }

450	    def _describe_available_analysis(self, context: dict, intent: str) -> str:
451	        """Describe what can be analysed with currently connected data."""
452	        parts = []
453	        if context.get("has_credit"):
454	            parts.append("Credit score assessment, credit utilization, tradeline analysis, delinquency check")
455	        if context.get("has_bank"):
456	            parts.append("Cash flow patterns, average daily balance, income stability, NSF/overdraft check")
457	        if context.get("has_qb"):
458	            parts.append("Revenue verification, P&L analysis, DSCR calculation, balance sheet ratios")
459	        if not parts:
460	            parts.append("General loan product education and typical qualification criteria")
461	        return "; ".join(parts)
462	
463	    def _describe_unavailable_analysis(self, missing_keys: list[str], intent: str) -> str:
464	        """Describe what requires the missing data sources."""
465	        descriptions = {
466	            "credit":     "credit score check, credit-based product eligibility, rate estimation based on creditworthiness",
467	            "bank":       "cash flow analysis, average balance verification, NSF/overdraft risk assessment",
468	            "quickbooks": "revenue verification, DSCR calculation, P&L-based qualification, financial ratio analysis",
469	        }
470	        parts = [descriptions[k] for k in missing_keys if k in descriptions]
471	        return "; ".join(parts) if parts else "Personalised qualification analysis"
472	
473	    def build_qualification_prompt(
474	        self,
475	        context: dict[str, Any],
476	        desired_loan_type: str,
477	        desired_amount: float,
478	        loan_purpose: str = "",
479	    ) -> str:
480	        """
481	        Assemble a full qualification analysis prompt with all available data.
482	        Fills the qualification_prompt.txt template with pre-processed values.
483	        """
484	        template = _load_prompt("qualification_prompt.txt")
485	
486	        company = context.get("company") or {}
487	        financials = context.get("financials") or {}
488	        personal_credit = context.get("credit_personal") or {}
489	        business_credit = context.get("credit_business") or {}
490	        bank = context.get("bank_data") or {}
491	        cash_flow = bank.get("cash_flow_analysis") or {}
492	        snapshots = bank.get("monthly_snapshots") or []
493	
494	        avg_daily_balance = 0
495	        nsf_count = 0
496	        if snapshots:
497	            avg_daily_balance = sum(s.get("average_daily_balance", 0) for s in snapshots) / len(snapshots)
498	            nsf_count = sum(s.get("nsf_overdraft_count", 0) for s in snapshots)
499	
500	        from datetime import datetime
501	        _now_year = datetime.now().year
502	        try:
503	            year_established = company.get("year_established")
504	            if year_established is None:
505	                year_established = _now_year
506	            else:
507	                year_established = int(str(year_established)[:4])
508	        except (TypeError, ValueError):
509	            year_established = _now_year
510	        years_in_business = _now_year - year_established
511	
512	        annual_revenue = financials.get("revenue", 0)
513	        net_income = financials.get("net_income", 0)
514	        total_debt = personal_credit.get("total_debt", 0)
515	
516	        def _num(v: Any) -> float:
517	            if v is None:
518	                return 0.0
519	            try:
520	                return float(v)
521	            except (TypeError, ValueError):
522	                return 0.0
523	
524	        monthly_debt_service = sum(
525	            _num(t.get("monthly_payment"))
526	            for t in personal_credit.get("tradelines", [])
527	            if t.get("status") != "closed"
528	        )
529	        dscr = round(net_income / 12 / monthly_debt_service, 2) if monthly_debt_service > 0 else 99.0
530	
531	        products = context.get("loan_products_engine") or []
532	        qual_results = self.qualification_engine.qualify(context, products, desired_loan_type, desired_amount)
533	        matched_lenders = self.qualification_engine.match_lenders(context, desired_loan_type)
534	
535	        qual_text = self._format_qualification_results(qual_results)
536	        lender_text = self._format_matched_lenders(matched_lenders)
537	
538	        public_records = personal_credit.get("public_records", [])
539	        pr_summary = "None" if not public_records else "; ".join(
540	            f"{r.get('type', 'unknown')} ({r.get('status', 'unknown')}, ${r.get('amount', 0):,.0f})"
541	            for r in public_records
542	        )
543	
544	        try:
545	            filled = template.format(
546	                company_name=company.get("company_name", "Unknown"),
547	                industry=company.get("industry", "Unknown"),
548	                naics_code=company.get("naics_code", "N/A"),
549	                year_established=year_established,
550	                years_in_business=years_in_business,
551	                employees=company.get("employees", "N/A"),
552	                city=company.get("city", "N/A"),
553	                state=company.get("state", "N/A"),
554	                credit_bureau=personal_credit.get("bureau", "N/A"),
555	                credit_pull_date=personal_credit.get("pull_date", "N/A"),
556	                fico_score=personal_credit.get("fico_score", "N/A"),
557	                credit_utilization=personal_credit.get("credit_utilization", "N/A"),
558	                total_debt=total_debt,
559	                tradeline_count=len(personal_credit.get("tradelines", [])),
560	                delinquent_count=personal_credit.get("delinquencies", 0),
561	                inquiries_12mo=personal_credit.get("inquiries_last_12_months", 0),
562	                public_records_summary=pr_summary,
563	                paydex_score=business_credit.get("dnb_paydex", "N/A"),
564	                intelliscore=business_credit.get("experian_intelliscore", "N/A"),
565	                bank_refresh_date=bank.get("last_refresh", "N/A"),
566	                primary_balance=bank.get("accounts", [{}])[0].get("current_balance", 0) if bank.get("accounts") else 0,
567	                avg_monthly_deposits=cash_flow.get("average_monthly_income", 0),
568	                avg_monthly_withdrawals=cash_flow.get("average_monthly_expenses", 0),
569	                avg_daily_balance=avg_daily_balance,
570	                nsf_count=nsf_count,
571	                cash_flow_score=bank.get("cash_flow_score", "N/A"),
572	                seasonality_index=cash_flow.get("seasonality_index", "N/A"),
573	                income_volatility=cash_flow.get("income_volatility", "N/A"),
574	                financial_period=financials.get("period", "N/A"),
575	                annual_revenue=annual_revenue,
576	                net_income=net_income,
577	                profit_margin=financials.get("profit_margin", 0),
578	                revenue_growth=financials.get("revenue_growth_yoy", 0),
579	                current_ratio=financials.get("current_ratio", 0),
580	                debt_to_equity=financials.get("debt_to_equity", 0),
581	                cash_on_hand=financials.get("cash_on_hand", 0),
582	                monthly_burn_rate=financials.get("monthly_burn_rate", 0),
583	                accounts_receivable=financials.get("accounts_receivable", 0),
584	                dscr=dscr,
585	                readiness_score=context.get("readiness_score", {}).get("overall", "N/A") if context.get("readiness_score") else "N/A",
586	                max_qualified_amount=context.get("readiness_score", {}).get("max_loan_amount", 0) if context.get("readiness_score") else 0,
587	                desired_loan_type=desired_loan_type,
588	                desired_amount=desired_amount,
589	                loan_purpose=loan_purpose or "Not specified",
590	                qualification_results=qual_text,
591	                matched_lenders=lender_text,
592	            )
593	        except KeyError as e:
594	            filled = f"[Context assembly error: missing field {e}. Partial data available.]"
595	
596	        return filled

598	    def build_gap_coaching_prompt(self, context: dict[str, Any], gaps: list[dict]) -> str:
599	        """Assemble gap coaching prompt with specific gap details."""
600	        template = _load_prompt("gap_coaching_prompt.txt")
601	        financials = context.get("financials") or {}
602	        personal_credit = context.get("credit_personal") or {}
603	        cash_flow = (context.get("bank_data") or {}).get("cash_flow_analysis") or {}
604	
605	        gap_text = "\n".join(
606	            f"  - {g.get('criterion', 'Unknown')}: Current={g.get('current')} | Required={g.get('required')} | Gap={g.get('gap_description', '')}"
607	            for g in gaps
608	        )
609	
610	        return template.format(
611	            gaps=gap_text or "No specific gaps identified",
612	            fico_score=personal_credit.get("fico_score", "N/A"),
613	            needed_fico="varies by product",
614	            annual_revenue=financials.get("revenue", 0),
615	            needed_revenue="varies by product",
616	            dscr="N/A",
617	            needed_dscr="varies by product",
618	            months_in_business="N/A",
619	            needed_months="varies by product",
620	            credit_utilization=personal_credit.get("credit_utilization", "N/A"),
621	            debt_to_equity=financials.get("debt_to_equity", "N/A"),
622	            max_debt_to_equity="varies by product",
623	            avg_monthly_income=cash_flow.get("average_monthly_income", 0),
624	            avg_monthly_expenses=cash_flow.get("average_monthly_expenses", 0),
625	            top_expense_categories="See bank feed data",
626	            reducible_expenses="Analysis pending",
627	            seasonal_notes=f"Seasonality index: {cash_flow.get('seasonality_index', 'N/A')}",
628	        )
629	
630	    def build_cross_sell_prompt(self, opportunities: list[dict]) -> str:
631	        """Assemble cross-sell prompt with detected savings opportunities."""
632	        template = _load_prompt("cross_sell_prompt.txt")
633	
634	        opp_text = "\n".join(
635	            f"  - {o.get('type', 'Unknown')}: {o.get('description', '')} | "
636	            f"Estimated savings: ${o.get('estimated_savings', 0):,.0f}/year | "
637	            f"Current spend: ${o.get('current_spend', 0):,.0f}/year | "
638	            f"Benchmark: ${o.get('benchmark_spend', 0):,.0f}/year"
639	            for o in opportunities
640	        )
641	
642	        return template.format(opportunities=opp_text or "No opportunities detected")
643	
644	    def get_data_availability_summary(self, context: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
645	        """Summarize what data is available for this SMB."""
646	        parts = []
647	        if context.get("has_qb"):
648	            parts.append("QuickBooks financials (revenue, P&L, balance sheet)")
649	        if context.get("has_credit"):
650	            parts.append("Credit bureau reports (personal + business)")
651	        if context.get("has_bank"):
652	            parts.append("Bank feed data from Plaid (transactions, cash flow)")
653	
654	        if not parts:
655	            return "No financial data connected yet. I can still help with general questions about loan types and qualification requirements."
656	
657	        return "Available data: " + ", ".join(parts)
658	
659	    def _format_qualification_results(self, results: dict) -> str:
660	        """Format qualification results for prompt injection."""
661	        if not results:
662	            return "No qualification results computed"
663	
664	        lines = []
665	        for _key, result in results.items():
666	            product_name = result.get("product_name") or _key
667	            status = "QUALIFIED" if result.get("qualifies") else "NOT QUALIFIED"
668	            lines.append(f"  {product_name}: {status}")
669	            if result.get("gaps"):
670	                for gap in result["gaps"]:
671	                    lines.append(f"    - Gap: {gap}")
672	            if result.get("match_score"):
673	                lines.append(f"    Match score: {result['match_score']}%")
674	        return "\n".join(lines)
675	
676	    def _format_matched_lenders(self, lenders: list[dict]) -> str:
677	        """Format matched lenders for prompt injection."""
678	        if not lenders:
679	            return "No lenders matched"
680	
681	        lines = []
682	        for l in lenders[:10]:
683	            name = l.get("name", "Unknown")
684	            score = l.get("match_score", 0)
685	            qualifies = "YES" if l.get("qualifies") else "NO"
686	            rate = l.get("rate_range", "N/A")
687	            lines.append(f"  {name}: Match={score}% | Qualifies={qualifies} | Rate={rate}")
688	            if l.get("gaps"):
689	                for gap in l["gaps"][:3]:
690	                    lines.append(f"    - {gap}")
691	        return "\n".join(lines)
692
