results.content:
1	"""
2	Credit Bureau Analytics Service.
3	
4	Parses raw Array.com MISMO 2.4 JSON from MongoDB and computes
5	structured credit analytics for the dashboard.
6	
7	KEY DESIGN PRINCIPLE:
8	  _FACTOR and _POSITIVE_FACTOR in the CREDIT_SCORE section are the single
9	  most important signals for understanding credit health. They explain
10	  exactly WHY the score is what it is and drive coaching recommendations.
11	
12	Special values in Array.com CREDIT_SUMMARY data:
13	  -3  = Not enough information to compute
14	  -4  = No data available from bureau
15	  -5  = Not applicable for this bureau
16	  N/A = Not applicable
17	  ""  = No data
18	
19	Uses Beanie ODM (not raw Motor) for all database queries — consistent
20	with the project-wide database pattern in agent.core.database.
21	"""
22	from __future__ import annotations
23	
24	import logging
25	from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
26	from typing import Any, Callable, Optional
27	
28	from agent.analytics.models.credit_bureau import (
29	    CreditAnalyticsResult,
30	    CreditFactorAnalysis,
31	    CreditInquiry,
32	    CreditLiability,
33	    CreditReportDocument,
34	    CreditResponse,
35	    CreditSummaryMetrics,
36	    InquiryAnalysis,
37	    ScoreFactor,
38	    SummaryDataPoint,
39	    TradelineAnalysis,
40	)
41	from agent.array.models import CreditReport, CreditReportAnalysis
42	from agent.credit.report_source import is_array_credit_report, latest_array_credit_report_query
43	
44	logger = logging.getLogger("loangen-credit-analytics")
45	
46	FACTOR_CATEGORY_MAP: dict[str, str] = {
47	    "32": "utilization",
48	    "65": "mix",
49	    "8": "history",
50	    "43": "age",
51	    "1": "history",
52	    "2": "utilization",
53	    "3": "utilization",
54	    "4": "age",
55	    "5": "inquiries",
56	    "6": "history",
57	    "7": "history",
58	    "9": "history",
59	    "10": "mix",
60	    "14": "utilization",
61	    "40": "utilization",
62	}
63	
64	FACTOR_SEVERITY_MAP: dict[str, str] = {
65	    "32": "medium",
66	    "65": "low",
67	    "8": "high",
68	    "43": "low",
69	    "1": "high",
70	    "2": "high",
71	    "3": "medium",
72	    "6": "high",
73	    "7": "medium",
74	    "14": "high",
75	    "40": "medium",
76	}
77	
78	
79	def _safe_int(val: str | None, default: int | None = None) -> int | None:
80	    """Parse a CREDIT_SUMMARY value, returning None for special/missing values."""
81	    if val is None or val == "" or val == "N/A":
82	        return default
83	    try:
84	        v = int(val)
85	        if v in (-3, -4, -5):
86	            return default
87	        return v
88	    except (ValueError, TypeError):
89	        return default
90	
91	
92	def _safe_float(val: str | None, default: float | None = None) -> float | None:
93	    if val is None or val == "" or val == "N/A":
94	        return default
95	    try:
96	        v = float(val)
97	        if v in (-3.0, -4.0):
98	            return default
99	        return v
100	    except (ValueError, TypeError):
101	        return default
102	
103	
104	def _get_summary_value(data_set: list[SummaryDataPoint], attr_id: str) -> str | None:
105	    for dp in data_set:
106	        if dp.id == attr_id:
107	            return dp.value
108	    return None
109	
110	
111	def _classify_risk_tier(score: int) -> tuple[str, str]:
112	    if score >= 800:
113	        return "excellent", "Exceptional credit — qualifies for best rates and terms"
114	    elif score >= 740:
115	        return "good", "Very good credit — strong qualification for most products"
116	    elif score >= 670:
117	        return "fair", "Good credit — qualifies for standard products, some premium"
118	    elif score >= 580:
119	        return "poor", "Fair credit — may need alternative or secured products"
120	    else:
121	        return "very_poor", "Poor credit — significant gaps to address before most products"
122	
123	
124	def _analyze_factor(factor: ScoreFactor, direction: str) -> CreditFactorAnalysis:
125	    code = factor.code
126	    category = FACTOR_CATEGORY_MAP.get(code, "other")
127	    severity = FACTOR_SEVERITY_MAP.get(code, "medium") if direction == "negative" else ""
128	
129	    return CreditFactorAnalysis(
130	        code=code,
131	        text=factor.text,
132	        direction=direction,
133	        severity=severity,
134	        category=category,
135	    )
136	
137	
138	def _analyze_inquiry(inq: CreditInquiry) -> InquiryAnalysis:
139	    """Transform a raw CreditInquiry into an InquiryAnalysis output model."""
140	    return InquiryAnalysis(
141	        creditor_name=inq.name,
142	        date=inq.date,
143	        business_type=inq.business_type,
144	        industry_text=inq.industry_text,
145	        purpose_type=inq.purpose_type,
146	        city=inq.city,
147	        state=inq.state,
148	    )
149	
150	
151	def _filter_inquiries_last_2_years(
152	    inquiries: list[CreditInquiry],
153	) -> list[CreditInquiry]:
154	    """Return only inquiries from the last 2 years, sorted newest first."""
155	    cutoff = datetime.now(timezone.utc) - timedelta(days=730)
156	    filtered = []
157	    for inq in inquiries:
158	        if not inq.date:
159	            continue
160	        try:
161	            inq_date = datetime.strptime(inq.date[:10], "%Y-%m-%d").replace(
162	                tzinfo=timezone.utc
163	            )
164	            if inq_date >= cutoff:
165	                filtered.append(inq)
166	        except (ValueError, IndexError):
167	            # Include if date is unparseable (better to show than hide)
168	            filtered.append(inq)
169	    # Sort newest first
170	    filtered.sort(key=lambda i: i.date, reverse=True)
171	    return filtered
172	
173	
174	def _count_raw_inquiries(raw_payload: dict[str, Any]) -> int:
175	    """Count CREDIT_INQUIRY records in raw Array payload."""
176	    src = raw_payload.get("CREDIT_RESPONSE", raw_payload)
177	    inquiries = src.get("CREDIT_INQUIRY")
178	    if isinstance(inquiries, list):
179	        return len(inquiries)
180	    if isinstance(inquiries, dict):
181	        return 1
182	    return 0
183	
184	
185	def _count_raw_payment_patterns(raw_payload: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[int, int]:
186	    """
187	    Count tradelines with payment pattern data and start dates.
188	
189	    Returns:
190	      (pattern_data_count, pattern_start_date_count)
191	    """
192	    src = raw_payload.get("CREDIT_RESPONSE", raw_payload)
193	    liabilities = src.get("CREDIT_LIABILITY")
194	    if isinstance(liabilities, dict):
195	        rows = [liabilities]
196	    elif isinstance(liabilities, list):
197	        rows = liabilities
198	    else:
199	        rows = []
200	
201	    pattern_data_count = 0
202	    pattern_start_date_count = 0
203	    for row in rows:
204	        if not isinstance(row, dict):
205	            continue
206	        pattern = row.get("_PAYMENT_PATTERN")
207	        if not isinstance(pattern, dict):
208	            continue
209	        if pattern.get("@_Data"):
210	            pattern_data_count += 1
211	        if pattern.get("@_StartDate"):
212	            pattern_start_date_count += 1
213	
214	    return pattern_data_count, pattern_start_date_count
215	
216	
217	def _needs_detail_refresh(
218	    raw_payload: dict[str, Any],
219	    cached_result: CreditAnalyticsResult,
220	) -> bool:
221	    """
222	    Detect stale pre-computed analysis that predates inquiry/account detail fields.
223	    """
224	    raw_inquiry_count = _count_raw_inquiries(raw_payload)
225	    cached_inquiry_count = len(cached_result.inquiries)
226	    if raw_inquiry_count > cached_inquiry_count:
227	        return True
228	
229	    raw_pattern_count, raw_pattern_start_count = _count_raw_payment_patterns(raw_payload)
230	    cached_pattern_count = sum(
231	        1 for tl in cached_result.tradelines
232	        if (tl.payment_pattern_data or tl.payment_history)
233	    )
234	    cached_pattern_start_count = sum(
235	        1 for tl in cached_result.tradelines
236	        if tl.payment_pattern_start_date
237	    )
238	
239	    if raw_pattern_count > cached_pattern_count:
240	        return True
241	    if raw_pattern_start_count > cached_pattern_start_count:
242	        return True
243	
244	    return False
245	
246	
247	def _analyze_tradeline(tl: CreditLiability) -> TradelineAnalysis:
248	    credit_limit = _safe_float(tl.credit_limit_amount)
249	    high_credit = _safe_float(tl.high_credit_amount)
250	    unpaid = _safe_float(tl.unpaid_balance_amount)
251	    monthly = _safe_float(tl.monthly_payment_amount)
252	
253	    utilization = None
254	    limit_basis = credit_limit if credit_limit and credit_limit > 0 else high_credit
255	    if limit_basis and limit_basis > 0 and unpaid is not None:
256	        utilization = round((unpaid / limit_basis) * 100, 1)
257	
258	    payment_history = ""
259	    if tl.payment_pattern:
260	        payment_history = tl.payment_pattern.data
261	
262	    late_30 = int(tl.late_count.days_30) if tl.late_count else 0
263	    late_60 = int(tl.late_count.days_60) if tl.late_count else 0
264	    late_90 = int(tl.late_count.days_90) if tl.late_count else 0
265	
266	    return TradelineAnalysis(
267	        creditor_name=tl.creditor.name if tl.creditor else "Unknown",
268	        account_type=tl.account_type,
269	        loan_type=tl.credit_loan_type,
270	        status=tl.account_status_type,
271	        is_open=tl.is_closed != "Y",
272	        credit_limit=credit_limit,
273	        unpaid_balance=unpaid,
274	        monthly_payment=monthly,
275	        utilization_pct=utilization,
276	        opened_date=tl.account_opened_date,
277	        payment_history=payment_history,
278	        late_30=late_30,
279	        late_60=late_60,
280	        late_90=late_90,
281	        rating_code=tl.current_rating.code if tl.current_rating else "",
282	        rating_type=tl.current_rating.type if tl.current_rating else "",
283	        is_derogatory=tl.derogatory_indicator == "Y",
284	        is_collection=tl.is_collection == "Y",
285	        is_chargeoff=tl.is_chargeoff == "Y",
286	        # Extended account-level detail fields
287	        account_identifier=tl.account_identifier,
288	        account_ownership_type=tl.account_ownership_type,
289	        high_balance=_safe_float(tl.high_balance_amount),
290	        high_credit=high_credit,
291	        last_activity_date=tl.last_activity_date,
292	        months_reviewed=_safe_int(tl.months_reviewed_count),
293	        account_balance_date=tl.account_balance_date,
294	        account_reported_date=tl.account_reported_date,
295	        credit_business_type=tl.credit_business_type,
296	        industry_text=tl.raw_industry_text,
297	        creditor_city=tl.creditor.city if tl.creditor else "",
298	        creditor_state=tl.creditor.state if tl.creditor else "",
299	        creditor_phone=tl.creditor.phone if tl.creditor else "",
300	        comment_text=tl.comment.text if tl.comment else "",
301	        payment_pattern_data=tl.payment_pattern.data if tl.payment_pattern else "",
302	        payment_pattern_start_date=tl.payment_pattern.start_date if tl.payment_pattern else "",
303	    )
304	
305	
306	def _extract_summary_metrics(summary_data: list[SummaryDataPoint]) -> CreditSummaryMetrics:
307	    gv = lambda attr_id: _get_summary_value(summary_data, attr_id)
308	
309	    return CreditSummaryMetrics(
310	        total_tradelines=_safe_int(gv("AP001")),
311	        open_tradelines=_safe_int(gv("AT02S")),
312	        closed_tradelines=_safe_int(gv("PT200")),
313	        hard_inquiries=_safe_int(gv("AP004")),
314	        total_payments=_safe_int(gv("AP005")),
315	        delinquencies_ever=_safe_int(gv("PT184"), 0) or 0,
316	        delinquencies_12mo=_safe_int(gv("PT027"), 0) or 0,
317	        delinquencies_24mo=_safe_int(gv("PT071"), 0) or 0,
318	        collections_count=_safe_int(gv("S068A"), 0) or 0,
319	        public_records=_safe_int(gv("G093S"), 0) or 0,
320	        bankruptcies=_safe_int(gv("G094S"), 0) or 0,
321	        foreclosures=_safe_int(gv("PT134"), 0) or 0,
322	        repossessions=_safe_int(gv("PT133"), 0) or 0,
323	        tax_liens=_safe_int(gv("PT130"), 0) or 0,
324	        oldest_trade_months=_safe_int(gv("AT20S")),
325	        total_balance=_safe_float(gv("PT202")),
326	        total_credit_limit=_safe_float(gv("PT054")),
327	        revolving_utilization_pct=_safe_float(gv("PT016")),
328	        bankcard_utilization_pct=_safe_float(gv("PT126")),
329	        monthly_payment_total=_safe_float(gv("PT014")),
330	        mortgage_payment=_safe_float(gv("PT019")),
331	        auto_payment=_safe_float(gv("PT021")),
332	        pct_never_delinquent=_safe_float(gv("PT093")),
333	        thin_file=gv("PT203") == "Y",
334	    )
335	
336	
337	def compute_credit_analytics(raw_json: dict[str, Any], smb_id: str) -> CreditAnalyticsResult:
338	    """
339	    Compute full credit analytics from a raw Array.com JSON response.
340	    This is the main entry point — called with the raw stored JSON.
341	    """
342	    cr_data = raw_json.get("CREDIT_RESPONSE", raw_json)
343	    response = CreditResponse.model_validate(cr_data)
344	
345	    # --- Score ---
346	    score_val = int(response.credit_score.value) if response.credit_score else 0
347	    score_model = response.credit_score.model_name if response.credit_score else "Unknown"
348	    risk_pct = _safe_int(
349	        response.credit_score.risk_based_pricing_percent
350	    ) if response.credit_score else None
351	
352	    # --- FACTORS — the most critical section ---
353	    negative_factors = [
354	        _analyze_factor(f, "negative")
355	        for f in (response.credit_score.factors if response.credit_score else [])
356	    ]
357	    positive_factors = [
358	        _analyze_factor(f, "positive")
359	        for f in (response.credit_score.positive_factors if response.credit_score else [])
360	    ]
361	
362	    # --- Tradelines ---
363	    tradelines = [_analyze_tradeline(tl) for tl in response.liabilities]
364	
365	    tradeline_summary: dict[str, int] = {}
366	    for tl in tradelines:
367	        key = f"{tl.account_type}_{tl.status}"
368	        tradeline_summary[key] = tradeline_summary.get(key, 0) + 1
369	
370	    # --- Summary metrics ---
371	    summary_data = (
372	        response.credit_summary.data_set if response.credit_summary else []
373	    )
374	    if not summary_data and response.credit_summary_xpn:
375	        summary_data = response.credit_summary_xpn.data_set
376	
377	    summary = _extract_summary_metrics(summary_data)
378	
379	    # --- Borrower info ---
380	    borrower_name = ""
381	    borrower_state = ""
382	    if response.borrower:
383	        borrower_name = f"{response.borrower.first_name} {response.borrower.last_name}"
384	        if response.borrower.residences:
385	            for r in response.borrower.residences:
386	                if r.residency_type == "Current":
387	                    borrower_state = r.state
388	                    break
389	
390	    # --- Risk tier ---
391	    risk_tier, risk_desc = _classify_risk_tier(score_val)
392	
393	    # --- Inquiries (last 2 years only) ---
394	    recent_inquiries = _filter_inquiries_last_2_years(response.inquiries)
395	    inquiry_analyses = [_analyze_inquiry(inq) for inq in recent_inquiries]
396	
397	    return CreditAnalyticsResult(
398	        smb_id=smb_id,
399	        provider="array",
400	        report_date=response.report_date or "",
401	        credit_score=score_val,
402	        score_model=score_model,
403	        risk_percentile=risk_pct,
404	        negative_factors=negative_factors,
405	        positive_factors=positive_factors,
406	        tradelines=tradelines,
407	        tradeline_summary=tradeline_summary,
408	        inquiries=inquiry_analyses,
409	        summary=summary,
410	        borrower_name=borrower_name,
411	        borrower_state=borrower_state,
412	        risk_tier=risk_tier,
413	        risk_description=risk_desc,
414	    )

417	def build_credit_analytics_checklist_v1(
418	    analytics_payload: dict[str, Any],
419	) -> dict[str, Any]:
420	    """
421	    Compact chat-focused credit checklist payload.
422	
423	    This is intentionally additive and stored under
424	    `analysis.credit_analytics_checklist_v1` so existing consumers of the
425	    top-level analytics schema remain unchanged.
426	    """
427	    summary = analytics_payload.get("summary") or {}
428	    tradelines = analytics_payload.get("tradelines") or []
429	
430	    top_negative = (analytics_payload.get("negative_factors") or [])[:3]
431	    top_positive = (analytics_payload.get("positive_factors") or [])[:3]
432	
433	    open_tradelines = [t for t in tradelines if t.get("is_open")]
434	    total_monthly_payment = sum(
435	        float(t.get("monthly_payment") or 0.0) for t in open_tradelines
436	    )
437	    severe_delinquency_count = sum(
438	        1
439	        for t in tradelines
440	        if (int(t.get("late_90") or 0) > 1) or bool(t.get("is_chargeoff"))
441	    )
442	    delinquent_open_count = sum(
443	        1
444	        for t in open_tradelines
445	        if (int(t.get("late_30") or 0) > 0)
446	        or (int(t.get("late_60") or 0) > 0)
447	        or (int(t.get("late_90") or 0) > 0)
448	        or bool(t.get("is_collection"))
449	        or bool(t.get("is_chargeoff"))
450	    )
451	
452	    return {
453	        "version": "credit_analytics_checklist_v1",
454	        "score_and_factors": {
455	            "credit_score": analytics_payload.get("credit_score"),
456	            "score_model": analytics_payload.get("score_model"),
457	            "score_range": {
458	                "min": analytics_payload.get("score_range_min"),
459	                "max": analytics_payload.get("score_range_max"),
460	            },
461	            "risk_tier": analytics_payload.get("risk_tier"),
462	            "negative_factors_top3": top_negative,
463	            "positive_factors_top3": top_positive,
464	        },
465	        "tradeline_signals": {
466	            "total_tradelines": len(tradelines),
467	            "open_tradelines": len(open_tradelines),
468	            "delinquent_open_tradelines": delinquent_open_count,
469	            "severe_delinquency_tradelines": severe_delinquency_count,
470	            "monthly_payment_obligation_total": round(total_monthly_payment, 2),
471	            "tradelines_sample": tradelines[:20],
472	        },
473	        "summary_metrics": {
474	            "hard_inquiries": summary.get("hard_inquiries"),
475	            "revolving_utilization_pct": summary.get("revolving_utilization_pct"),
476	            "bankcard_utilization_pct": summary.get("bankcard_utilization_pct"),
477	            "delinquencies_12mo": summary.get("delinquencies_12mo"),
478	            "delinquencies_24mo": summary.get("delinquencies_24mo"),
479	            "thin_file": summary.get("thin_file"),
480	            "public_records": summary.get("public_records"),
481	            "collections_count": summary.get("collections_count"),
482	            "bankruptcies": summary.get("bankruptcies"),
483	            "foreclosures": summary.get("foreclosures"),
484	        },
485	    }

488	async def fetch_latest_raw_credit_json_for_user(user_id: str) -> Optional[dict[str, Any]]:
489	    """
490	    Newest raw Array MISMO payload for the user, for chat re-enrichment.
491	
492	    Prefer ``credit_reports`` (production pulls). Fall back to ``raw_credit_reports``
493	    (legacy seed) so enrichment does not depend on pre-computed analysis docs.
494	    """
495	    try:
496	        latest = await latest_array_credit_report_query(user_id)
497	        if latest and latest.creditReportData:
498	            return latest.creditReportData
499	    except Exception as exc:
500	        logger.debug("fetch_latest_raw_credit_json CreditReport: %s", exc)
501	    try:
502	        doc = await CreditReportDocument.find_one(
503	            CreditReportDocument.smb_id == user_id,
504	            sort=[("fetched_at", -1)],
505	        )
506	        if doc and doc.raw_json:
507	            return doc.raw_json
508	    except Exception as exc:
509	        logger.debug("fetch_latest_raw_credit_json CreditReportDocument: %s", exc)
510	    return None

513	async def fetch_latest_credit_analysis_json_for_user(user_id: str) -> Optional[dict[str, Any]]:
514	    """
515	    Newest persisted computed credit analytics payload for the user.
516	
517	    Reads from `credit_report_analysis` linked to the latest `credit_reports`
518	    document and falls back to latest analysis by userId.
519	    """
520	    try:
521	        latest = await latest_array_credit_report_query(user_id)
522	        if latest:
523	            analysis = await CreditReportAnalysis.find_one(
524	                CreditReportAnalysis.creditReportId == latest.creditReportId
525	            )
526	            if analysis and analysis.analysis:
527	                return analysis.analysis
528	    except Exception as exc:
529	        logger.debug("fetch_latest_credit_analysis latest-report path: %s", exc)
530	
531	    try:
532	        analysis = (
533	            await CreditReportAnalysis.find(CreditReportAnalysis.userId == user_id)
534	            .sort("-createdDate")
535	            .limit(10)
536	            .to_list()
537	        )
538	        for row in analysis:
539	            if row.analysis and not row.analysis.get("document_id"):
540	                src = row.analysis.get("source")
541	                if src in (None, "", "array"):
542	                    return row.analysis
543	    except Exception as exc:
544	        logger.debug("fetch_latest_credit_analysis fallback path: %s", exc)
545	
546	    return None

549	class CreditBureauAnalyticsService:
550	    """
551	    Service to fetch raw credit data from MongoDB and compute analytics.
552	    Falls back to None when data_mode is mock or document not found.
553	
554	    Uses Beanie ODM queries — CreditReportDocument.find_one() — instead
555	    of raw Motor collection access.
556	    """
557	
558	    def __init__(self, live: bool = False):
559	        self._live = live
560	
561	    async def _get_previous_score(self, smb_id: str, skip_report_id: str) -> Optional[int]:
562	        """
563	        Return the credit_score from the second-most-recent report for this user.
564	        Used to calculate the score trend (+/- pts).  Returns None when only one
565	        report exists or when the score cannot be read.
566	        """
567	        reports = (
568	            await CreditReport.find(CreditReport.userId == smb_id)
569	            .sort("-createdDate")
570	            .limit(10)
571	            .to_list()
572	        )
573	        array_reports = [r for r in reports if is_array_credit_report(r)]
574	        if len(array_reports) < 2:
575	            return None
576	
577	        prev_report = array_reports[1]
578	        if str(prev_report.creditReportId) == str(skip_report_id):
579	            # Edge-case guard: same report listed twice
580	            return None
581	
582	        # Try the pre-computed analysis first (fast path)
583	        prev_analysis = await CreditReportAnalysis.find_one(
584	            CreditReportAnalysis.creditReportId == prev_report.creditReportId
585	        )
586	        if prev_analysis and prev_analysis.analysis:
587	            return prev_analysis.analysis.get("credit_score")
588	
589	        # Fallback: parse just the score from the raw report data
590	        if prev_report.creditReportData:
591	            try:
592	                parsed = compute_credit_analytics(prev_report.creditReportData, smb_id)
593	                return parsed.credit_score if parsed else None
594	            except Exception:
595	                pass
596	
597	        return None
598	
599	    @staticmethod
600	    def _safe_dump(value: Any) -> Any:
601	        if value is None:
602	            return None
603	        if hasattr(value, "model_dump"):
604	            try:
605	                return value.model_dump(mode="json")
606	            except Exception:
607	                return value.model_dump()
608	        if isinstance(value, (dict, list, str, int, float, bool)):
609	            return value
610	        return str(value)
611	
612	    @staticmethod
613	    def _emit_debug(
614	        debug_hook: Optional[Callable[[str, dict], None]],
615	        event: str,
616	        payload: dict,
617	    ) -> None:
618	        if not debug_hook:
619	            return
620	        try:
621	            debug_hook(event, payload)
622	        except Exception:
623	            pass
624	
625	    async def get_analytics(
626	        self,
627	        smb_id: str,
628	        debug_hook: Optional[Callable[[str, dict], None]] = None,
629	    ) -> CreditAnalyticsResult | None:
630	        if self._live:
631	            # Step 1: get the latest credit report for this user
632	            self._emit_debug(
633	                debug_hook,
634	                "credit.latest_report.query",
635	                {
636	                    "collection": "CreditReport",
637	                    "filter": {"userId": smb_id},
638	                    "sort": "-createdDate",
639	                },
640	            )
641	            latest_report = await latest_array_credit_report_query(smb_id)
642	            self._emit_debug(
643	                debug_hook,
644	                "credit.latest_report.result",
645	                {
646	                    "collection": "CreditReport",
647	                    "found": bool(latest_report),
648	                    "document": self._safe_dump(latest_report),
649	                },
650	            )
651	
652	            if latest_report:
653	                # Step 2: fetch the linked pre-computed analysis via creditReportId
654	                self._emit_debug(
655	                    debug_hook,
656	                    "credit.analysis.query",
657	                    {
658	                        "collection": "CreditReportAnalysis",
659	                        "filter": {"creditReportId": str(latest_report.creditReportId)},
660	                    },
661	                )
662	                analysis_doc = await CreditReportAnalysis.find_one(
663	                    CreditReportAnalysis.creditReportId == latest_report.creditReportId
664	                )
665	                self._emit_debug(
666	                    debug_hook,
667	                    "credit.analysis.result",
668	                    {
669	                        "collection": "CreditReportAnalysis",
670	                        "found": bool(analysis_doc),
671	                        "document": self._safe_dump(analysis_doc),
672	                    },
673	                )
674	
675	                result: CreditAnalyticsResult | None = None
676	
677	                if analysis_doc and analysis_doc.analysis:
678	                    logger.info(
679	                        f"Returning pre-computed analysis for userId={smb_id} "
680	                        f"creditReportId={latest_report.creditReportId}"
681	                    )
682	                    try:
683	                        result = CreditAnalyticsResult.model_validate(analysis_doc.analysis)
684	                        if latest_report.creditReportData and _needs_detail_refresh(
685	                            latest_report.creditReportData,
686	                            result,
687	                        ):
688	                            logger.info(
689	                                "Cached analysis missing detail fields for userId=%s. Recomputing from raw report.",
690	                                smb_id,
691	                            )
692	                            result = compute_credit_analytics(
693	                                latest_report.creditReportData,
694	                                smb_id,
695	                            )
696	                            analysis_doc.analysis = result.model_dump()
697	                            analysis_doc.updatedDate = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
698	                            await analysis_doc.save()
699	                    except Exception as exc:
700	                        logger.warning(
701	                            f"Analysis parse failed for {smb_id}, re-computing from raw: {exc}"
702	                        )
703	                        result = compute_credit_analytics(
704	                            latest_report.creditReportData, smb_id
705	                        )
706	                elif latest_report.creditReportData:
707	                    # analysis doc missing — re-compute directly from raw report JSON
708	                    logger.info(f"Re-computing analytics from raw report for userId={smb_id}")
709	                    result = compute_credit_analytics(latest_report.creditReportData, smb_id)
710	
711	                if result is not None:
712	                    # Step 3: attach previous score for trend display (+/- pts)
713	                    result.previous_score = await self._get_previous_score(
714	                        smb_id, str(latest_report.creditReportId)
715	                    )
716	                    self._emit_debug(
717	                        debug_hook,
718	                        "credit.analytics.return",
719	                        {
720	                            "source": "live",
721	                            "result": self._safe_dump(result),
722	                        },
723	                    )
724	                    return result
725	
726	            # Legacy fallback: old raw_credit_reports collection (seed data)
727	            self._emit_debug(
728	                debug_hook,
729	                "credit.legacy.query",
730	                {
731	                    "collection": "CreditReportDocument",
732	                    "filter": {"smb_id": smb_id},
733	                },
734	            )
735	            doc = await CreditReportDocument.find_one(
736	                CreditReportDocument.smb_id == smb_id
737	            )
738	            self._emit_debug(
739	                debug_hook,
740	                "credit.legacy.result",
741	                {
742	                    "collection": "CreditReportDocument",
743	                    "found": bool(doc),
744	                    "document": self._safe_dump(doc),
745	                },
746	            )
747	            if doc and doc.raw_json:
748	                logger.info(f"Computing analytics from legacy CreditReportDocument for {smb_id}")
749	                legacy_result = compute_credit_analytics(doc.raw_json, smb_id)
750	                self._emit_debug(
751	                    debug_hook,
752	                    "credit.analytics.return",
753	                    {
754	                        "source": "legacy",
755	                        "result": self._safe_dump(legacy_result),
756	                    },
757	                )
758	                return legacy_result
759	
760	        logger.info(f"No live credit data for {smb_id}, returning None (caller falls back to mock)")
761	        self._emit_debug(
762	            debug_hook,
763	            "credit.analytics.return",
764	            {"source": "none", "result": None},
765	        )
766	        return None
767	
768	    async def get_all_reports(self) -> list[dict[str, str]]:
769	        """List all stored credit report IDs."""
770	        if not self._live:
771	            return []
772	        docs = await CreditReportDocument.find_all().to_list()
773	        return [
774	            {"smb_id": doc.smb_id, "fetched_at": doc.fetched_at.isoformat()}
775	            for doc in docs
776	        ]

\"1\": \"history\",\n    \"2\": \"utilization\",\n    \"3\": \"utilization\",\n    \"4\": \"age\",\n    \"5\": \"inquiries\",\n    \"6\": \"history\",\n    \"7\": \"history\",\n    \"9\": monthly_payment=monthly,\n        utilization_pct=utilization,\n        opened_date=tl.account_opened_date,\n        payment_history=payment_history,\n        late_30=late_30,\n        late_60=late_60,\n        late_90=late_90,\n        rating_code=tl.current_rating.code if tl.current_rating else \"\",\n        rating_type=tl.current_rating.type if tl.current_rating else \"\",\n        is_derogatory=tl.derogatory_indicator == \"Y\",\n        is_collection=tl.is_collection == \"Y\",\n        is_chargeoff=tl.is_chargeoff == \"Y\",\n        # Extended account-level detail fields\n        account_identifier=tl.account_identifier,\n        account_ownership_type=tl.account_ownership_type,\n        high_balance=_safe_float(tl.high_balance_amount),\n        high_credit=high_credit,\n        last_activity_date=tl.last_activity_date,\n        months_reviewed=_safe_int(tl.months_reviewed_count),\n        account_balance_date=tl.account_balance_date,\n        account_reported_date=tl.account_reported_date,\n        credit_business_type=tl.credit_business_type,\n        industry_text=tl.raw_industry_text,\n        creditor_city=tl.creditor.city if tl.creditor else \"\",\n        creditor_state=tl.creditor.state if tl.creditor else \"\",\n        creditor_phone=tl.creditor.phone if tl.creditor else \"\",\n        comment_text=tl.comment.text if tl.comment else \"\",\n        payment_pattern_data=tl.payment_pattern.data if tl.payment_pattern else \"\",\n        payment_pattern_start_date=tl.payment_pattern.start_date if tl.payment_pattern else \"\",\n    )\n\n\ndef _extract_summary_metrics(summary_data: list[SummaryDataPoint]) -> CreditSummaryMetrics:\n    gv = lambda attr_id: _get_summary_value(summary_data, attr_id)\n\n    return CreditSummaryMetrics(\n        total_tradelines=_safe_int(gv(\"AP001\")),\n        open_tradelines=_safe_int(gv(\"AT02S\")),\n        closed_tradelines=_safe_int(gv(\"PT200\")),\n        hard_inquiries=_safe_int(gv(\"AP004\")),\n        total_payments=_safe_int(gv(\"AP005\")),\n        delinquencies_ever=_safe_int(gv(\"PT184\"), 0) or 0,\n        delinquencies_12mo=_safe_int(gv(\"PT027\"), 0) or 0,\n        delinquencies_24mo=_safe_int(gv(\"PT071\"), 0) or 0,\n        collections_count=_safe_int(gv(\"S068A\"), 0) or 0,\n        public_records=_safe_int(gv(\"G093S\"), 0) or 0,\n        bankruptcies=_safe_int(gv(\"G094S\"), 0) or 0,\n        foreclosures=_safe_int(gv(\"PT134\"), 0) or 0,\n        repossessions=_safe_int(gv(\"PT133\"), 0) or 0,\n        tax_liens=_safe_int(gv(\"PT130\"), 0) or 0,\n        oldest_trade_months=_safe_int(gv(\"AT20S\")),\n        total_balance=_safe_float(gv(\"PT202\")),\n        total_credit_limit=_safe_float(gv(\"PT054\")),\n        revolving_utilization_pct=_safe_float(gv(\"PT016\")),\n        bankcard_utilization_pct=_safe_float(gv(\"PT126\")),\n        monthly_payment_total=_safe_float(gv(\"PT014\")),\n        mortgage_payment=_safe_float(gv(\"PT019\")),\n        auto_payment=_safe_float(gv(\"PT021\")),\n        pct_never_delinquent=_safe_float(gv(\"PT093\")),\n        thin_file=gv(\"PT203\") == \"Y\",\n    )\n\n\ndef compute_credit_analytics(raw_json: dict[str, Any], smb_id: str) -> CreditAnalyticsResult:\n    \"\"\"\n    Compute full credit analytics from a raw Array.com JSON response.\n    This is the main entry point — called with the raw stored JSON.\n    \"\"\"\n    cr_data = raw_json.get(\"CREDIT_RESPONSE\", raw_json)\n    response = CreditResponse.model_validate(cr_data)\n\n    # --- Score ---\n    score_val = int(response.credit_score.value) if response.credit_score else 0\n    score_model = response.credit_score.model_name if response.credit_score else \"Unknown\"\n    risk_pct = _safe_int(\n        response.credit_score.risk_based_pricing_percent\n    ) if response.credit_score else None\n\n    # --- FACTORS — the most critical section ---\n    negative_factors = [\n        _analyze_factor(f, \"negative\")\n        for f in (response.credit_score.factors if response.credit_score else [])\n    ]\n    positive_factors = [\n        _analyze_factor(f, \"positive\")\n        for f in (response.credit_score.positive_factors if response.credit_score else [])\n    ]\n\n    # --- Tradelines ---\n    tradelines = [_analyze_tradeline(tl) for tl in response.liabilities]\n\n    tradeline_summary: dict[str, int] = {}\n    for tl in tradelines:\n        key = f\"{tl.account_type}_{tl.status}\"\n        tradeline_summary[key] = tradeline_summary.get(key, 0) + 1\n\n    # --- Summary metrics ---\n    summary_data = (\n        response.credit_summary.data_set if response.credit_summary else []\n    )\n    if not summary_data and response.credit_summary_xpn:\n        summary_data = response.credit_summary_xpn.data_set\n\n    summary = _extract_summary_metrics(summary_data)\n\n    # --- Borrower info ---\n    borrower_name = \"\"\n    borrower_state = \"\"\n    if response.borrower:\n        borrower_name = f\"{response.borrower.first_name} {response.borrower.last_name}\"\n        if response.borrower.residences:\n            for r in response.borrower.residences:\n                if r.residency_type == \"Current\":\n                    borrower_state = r.state\n                    break\n\n    # --- Risk tier ---\n    risk_tier, risk_desc = _classify_risk_tier(score_val)\n\n    # --- Inquiries (last 2 years only) ---\n    recent_inquiries = _filter_inquiries_last_2_years(response.inquiries)\n    inquiry_analyses = [_analyze_inquiry(inq) for inq in recent_inquiries]\n\n    return CreditAnalyticsResult(\n        smb_id=smb_id,\n        provider=\"array\",\n        report_date=response.report_date or \"\",\n        credit_score=score_val,\n        score_model=score_model,\n        risk_percentile=risk_pct,\n        negative_factors=negative_factors,\n        positive_factors=positive_factors,\n        tradelines=tradelines,\n        tradeline_summary=tradeline_summary,\n        inquiries=inquiry_analyses,\n        summary=summary,\n        borrower_name=borrower_name,\n        borrower_state=borrower_state,\n        risk_tier=risk_tier,\n        risk_description=risk_desc,\n    )\n\n\ndef build_credit_analytics_checklist_v1(\n    analytics_payload: dict[str, Any],\n) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    Compact chat-focused credit checklist payload.\n\n    This is intentionally additive and stored under\n    `analysis.credit_analytics_checklist_v1` so existing consumers of the\n    top-level analytics schema remain unchanged.\n    \"\"\"\n    summary = analytics_payload.get(\"summary\") or {}\n    tradelines = analytics_payload.get(\"tradelines\") or []\n\n    top_negative = (analytics_payload.get(\"negative_factors\") or [])[:3]\n    top_positive = (analytics_payload.get(\"positive_factors\") or [])[:3]\n\n    open_tradelines = [t for t in tradelines if t.get(\"is_open\")]\n    total_monthly_payment = sum(\n        float(t.get(\"monthly_payment\") or 0.0) for t in open_tradelines\n    )\n    severe_delinquency_count = sum(\n        1\n        for t in tradelines\n        if (int(t.get(\"late_90\") or 0) > 1) or bool(t.get(\"is_chargeoff\"))\n    )\n    delinquent_open_count = sum(\n        1\n        for t in open_tradelines\n        if (int(t.get(\"late_30\") or 0) > 0)\n        or (int(t.get(\"late_60\") or 0) > 0)\n        or (int(t.get(\"late_90\") or 0) > 0)\n        or bool(t.get(\"is_collection\"))\n        or bool(t.get(\"is_chargeoff\"))\n    )\n\n    return {\n        \"version\": \"credit_analytics_checklist_v1\",\n        \"score_and_factors\": {\n            \"credit_score\": analytics_payload.get(\"credit_score\"),\n            \"score_model\": analytics_payload.get(\"score_model\"),\n            \"score_range\": {\n                \"min\": analytics_payload.get(\"score_range_min\"),\n                \"max\": analytics_payload.get(\"score_range_max\"),\n            },\n            \"risk_tier\": analytics_payload.get(\"risk_tier\"),\n            \"negative_factors_top3\": top_negative,\n            \"positive_factors_top3\": top_positive,\n        },\n        \"tradeline_signals\": {\n            \"total_tradelines\": len(tradelines),\n            \"open_tradelines\": len(open_tradelines),\n            \"delinquent_open_tradelines\": delinquent_open_count,\n            \"severe_delinquency_tradelines\": severe_delinquency_count,\n            \"monthly_payment_obligation_total\": round(total_monthly_payment, 2),\n            \"tradelines_sample\": tradelines[:20],\n        },\n        \"summary_metrics\": {\n            \"hard_inquiries\": summary.get(\"hard_inquiries\"),\n            \"revolving_utilization_pct\": summary.get(\"revolving_utilization_pct\"),\n            \"bankcard_utilization_pct\": summary.get(\"bankcard_utilization_pct\"),\n            \"delinquencies_12mo\": summary.get(\"delinquencies_12mo\"),\n            \"delinquencies_24mo\": summary.get(\"delinquencies_24mo\"),\n            \"thin_file\": summary.get(\"thin_file\"),\n            \"public_records\": summary.get(\"public_records\"),\n            \"collections_count\": summary.get(\"collections_count\"),\n            \"bankruptcies\": summary.get(\"bankruptcies\"),\n            \"foreclosures\": summary.get(\"foreclosures\"),\n        },\n    }\n\n\nasync def fetch_latest_raw_credit_json_for_user(user_id: str) -> Optional[dict[str, Any]]:\n    \"\"\"\n    Newest raw Array MISMO payload for the user, for chat re-enrichment.\n\n    Prefer ``credit_reports`` (production pulls). Fall back to ``raw_credit_reports``\n    (legacy seed) so enrichment does not depend on pre-computed analysis docs.\n    \"\"\"\n    try:\n        latest = await latest_array_credit_report_query(user_id)\n        if latest and latest.creditReportData:\n            return latest.creditReportData\n    except Exception as exc:\n        logger.debug(\"fetch_latest_raw_credit_json CreditReport: %s\", exc)\n    try:\n        doc = await CreditReportDocument.find_one(\n            CreditReportDocument.smb_id == user_id,\n            sort=[(\"fetched_at\", -1)],\n        )\n        if doc and doc.raw_json:\n            return doc.raw_json\n    except Exception as exc:\n        logger.debug(\"fetch_latest_raw_credit_json CreditReportDocument: %s\", exc)\n    return None\n\n\nasync def fetch_latest_credit_analysis_json_for_user(user_id: str) -> Optional[dict[str, Any]]:\n    \"\"\"\n    Newest persisted computed credit analytics payload for the user.\n\n    Reads from `credit_report_analysis` linked to the latest `credit_reports`\n    document and falls back to latest analysis by userId.\n    \"\"\"\n    try:\n        latest = await latest_array_credit_report_query(user_id)\n        if latest:\n            analysis = await CreditReportAnalysis.find_one(\n                CreditReportAnalysis.creditReportId == latest.creditReportId\n            )\n            if analysis and analysis.analysis:\n                return analysis.analysis\n    except Exception as exc:\n        logger.debug(\"fetch_latest_credit_analysis latest-report path: %s\", exc)\n\n    try:\n        analysis = (\n            await CreditReportAnalysis.find(CreditReportAnalysis.userId == user_id)\n            .sort(\"-createdDate\")\n            .limit(10)\n            .to_list()\n        )\n        for row in analysis:\n            if row.analysis and not row.analysis.get(\"document_id\"):\n                src = row.analysis.get(\"source\")\n                if src in (None, \"\", \"array\"):\n                    return row.analysis\n    except Exception as exc:\n        logger.debug(\"fetch_latest_credit_analysis fallback path: %s\", exc)\n\n    return None\n\n\nclass CreditBureauAnalyticsService:\n    \"\"\"\n    Service to fetch raw credit data from MongoDB and compute analytics.\n    Falls back to None when data_mode is mock or document not found.\n\n    Uses Beanie ODM queries — CreditReportDocument.find_one() — instead\n    of raw Motor collection access.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, live: bool = False):\n        self._live = live\n\n    async def _get_previous_score(self, smb_id: str, skip_report_id: str) -> Optional[int]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Return the credit_score from the second-most-recent report for this user.\n        Used to calculate the score trend (+/- pts).  Returns None when only one\n        report exists or when the score cannot be read.\n        \"\"\"\n        reports = (\n            await CreditReport.find(CreditReport.userId == smb_id)\n            .sort(\"-createdDate\")\n            .limit(10)\n            .to_list()\n        )\n        array_reports = [r for r in reports if is_array_credit_report(r)]\n        if len(array_reports) < 2:\n            return None\n\n        prev_report = array_reports[1]\n        if str(prev_report.creditReportId) == str(skip_report_id):\n            # Edge-case guard: same report listed twice\n            return None\n\n        # Try the pre-computed analysis first (fast path)\n        prev_analysis = await CreditReportAnalysis.find_one(\n            CreditReportAnalysis.creditReportId == prev_report.creditReportId\n        )\n        if prev_analysis and prev_analysis.analysis:\n            return prev_analysis.analysis.get(\"credit_score\")\n\n        # Fallback: parse just the score from the raw report data\n        if prev_report.creditReportData:\n            try:\n                parsed = compute_credit_analytics(prev_report.creditReportData, smb_id)\n                return parsed.credit_score if parsed else None\n            except Exception:\n                pass\n\n        return None\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def _safe_dump(value: Any) -> Any:\n        if value is None:\n            return None\n        if hasattr(value, \"model_dump\"):\n            try:\n                return value.model_dump(mode=\"json\")\n            except Exception:\n                return value.model_dump()\n        if isinstance(value, (dict, list, str, int, float, bool)):\n            return value\n        return str(value)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def _emit_debug(\n        debug_hook: Optional[Callable[[str, dict], None]],\n        event: str,\n        payload: dict,\n    ) -> None:\n        if not debug_hook:\n            return\n        try:\n            debug_hook(event, payload)\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n    async def get_analytics(\n        self,\n        smb_id: str,\n        debug_hook: Optional[Callable[[str, dict], None]] = None,\n    ) -> CreditAnalyticsResult | None:\n        if self._live:\n            # Step 1: get the latest credit report for this user\n            self._emit_debug(\n                debug_hook,\n                \"credit.latest_report.query\",\n                {\n                    \"collection\": \"CreditReport\",\n                    \"filter\": {\"userId\": smb_id},\n                    \"sort\": \"-createdDate\",\n                },\n            )\n            latest_report = await latest_array_credit_report_query(smb_id)\n            self._emit_debug(\n                debug_hook,\n                \"credit.latest_report.result\",\n                {\n                    \"collection\": \"CreditReport\",\n                    \"found\": bool(latest_report),\n                    \"document\": self._safe_dump(latest_report),\n                },\n            )\n\n            if latest_report:\n                # Step 2: fetch the linked pre-computed analysis via creditReportId\n                self._emit_debug(\n                    debug_hook,\n                    \"credit.analysis.query\",\n                    {\n                        \"collection\": \"CreditReportAnalysis\",\n                        \"filter\": {\"creditReportId\": str(latest_report.creditReportId)},\n                    },\n                )\n                analysis_doc = await CreditReportAnalysis.find_one(\n                    CreditReportAnalysis.creditReportId == latest_report.creditReportId\n                )\n                self._emit_debug(\n                    debug_hook,\n                    \"credit.analysis.result\",\n                    {\n                        \"collection\": \"CreditReportAnalysis\",\n                        \"found\": bool(analysis_doc),\n                        \"document\": self._safe_dump(analysis_doc),\n                    },\n                )\n\n                result: CreditAnalyticsResult | None = None\n\n                if analysis_doc and analysis_doc.analysis:\n                    logger.info(\n                        f\"Returning pre-computed analysis for userId={smb_id} \"\n                        f\"creditReportId={latest_report.creditReportId}\"\n                    )\n                    try:\n                        result = CreditAnalyticsResult.model_validate(analysis_doc.analysis)\n                        if latest_report.creditReportData and _needs_detail_refresh(\n                            latest_report.creditReportData,\n                            result,\n                        ):\n                            logger.info(\n                                \"Cached analysis missing detail fields for userId=%s. Recomputing from raw report.\",\n                                smb_id,\n                            )\n                            result = compute_credit_analytics(\n                                latest_report.creditReportData,\n                                smb_id,\n                            )\n                            analysis_doc.analysis = result.model_dump()\n                            analysis_doc.updatedDate = datetime.now(timezone.utc)\n                            await analysis_doc.save()\n                    except Exception as exc:\n                        logger.warning(\n                            f\"Analysis parse failed for {smb_id}, re-computing from raw: {exc}\"\n                        )\n                        result = compute_credit_analytics(\n                            latest_report.creditReportData, smb_id\n                        )\n                elif latest_report.creditReportData:\n                    # analysis doc missing — re-compute directly from raw report JSON\n                    logger.info(f\"Re-computing analytics from raw report for userId={smb_id}\")\n                    result = compute_credit_analytics(latest_report.creditReportData, smb_id)\n\n                if result is not None:\n                    # Step 3: attach previous score for trend display (+/- pts)\n                    result.previous_score = await self._get_previous_score(\n                        smb_id, str(latest_report.creditReportId)\n                    )\n                    self._emit_debug(\n                        debug_hook,\n                        \"credit.analytics.return\",\n                        {\n                            \"source\": \"live\",\n                            \"result\": self._safe_dump(result),\n                        },\n                    )\n                    return result\n\n            # Legacy fallback: old raw_credit_reports collection (seed data)\n            self._emit_debug(\n                debug_hook,\n                \"credit.legacy.query\",\n                {\n                    \"collection\": \"CreditReportDocument\",\n                    \"filter\": {\"smb_id\": smb_id},\n                },\n            )\n            doc = await CreditReportDocument.find_one(\n                CreditReportDocument.smb_id == smb_id\n            )\n            self._emit_debug(\n                debug_hook,\n                \"credit.legacy.result\",\n                {\n                    \"collection\": \"CreditReportDocument\",\n                    \"found\": bool(doc),\n                    \"document\": self._safe_dump(doc),\n                },\n            )\n            if doc and doc.raw_json:\n                logger.info(f\"Computing analytics from legacy CreditReportDocument for {smb_id}\")\n                legacy_result = compute_credit_analytics(doc.raw_json, smb_id)\n                self._emit_debug(\n                    debug_hook,\n                    \"credit.analytics.return\",\n                    {\n                        \"source\": \"legacy\",\n                        \"result\": self._safe_dump(legacy_result),\n                    },\n                )\n                return legacy_result\n\n        logger.info(f\"No live credit data for {smb_id}, returning None (caller falls back to mock)\")\n        self._emit_debug(\n            debug_hook,\n            \"credit.analytics.return\",\n            {\"source\": \"none\", \"result\": None},\n        )\n        return None\n\n    async def get_all_reports(self) -> list[dict[str, str]]:\n        \"\"\"List all stored credit report IDs.\"\"\"\n        if not self._live:\n            return []\n        docs = await CreditReportDocument.find_all().to_list()\n        return [\n            {\"smb_id\": doc.smb_id, \"fetched_at\": doc.fetched_at.isoformat()}\n            for doc in docs\n        ]\n", "numLines":
